316.action: [b][MOVE] CHASE[/b] away the animal by waving a freshly plucked mushroom in its face
316.text: The creature shrieks and skitters away. Gain item 1136[/b].

317.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the animal into the trees before turning to find its hunter
317.text: The creature blends in perfectly with the trees, to the point that you can’t even locate it. Gain 1 morale and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

318.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with the artifact in hand
318.text: In a blur of motion, you swipe the artifact and leave pursuers cursing you in your wake. Gain curse 1388[/b]. If you pay 4 boost, your attempts to use the artifact are successful (gain item 1008[/b]). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

319.action: [b][MOVE] CHASE[/b] the animal away from the rocks
319.text: The skittish animal is frightened by your aggressive approach, and it skitters into the brush. Gain 1 move[/b].

032.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the gate out of your way
032.text: You can push the gate all you want, but it isn’t going anywhere. Gain 1 boost and continue.

320.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to view the surrounding area
320.text: This tower sits where several regions meet. Choose one:

choices.option: Look northwest
choices.outcome: View page 39 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

choices.option: Look northeast
choices.outcome: View page 40 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

choices.option: Look southeast
choices.outcome: View page 44 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

choices.option: Look southwest
choices.outcome: View page 43 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

321.text: The stoic sentient welcomes you inside, where you find rows of classrooms along a main hallway. One is filling with young sentients in three queues; the other is empty. If you would like to join a line, go to interior 600[/b]. If you would like to be alone in a room, go to interior 567[/b].

322.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the sentient, letting them know of your presence
322.text: The little sentient shyly shows you their creation, a special flower arrangement. They mention that their focus at the academy is life magic, which gives them a slight advantage when working with flora. They share a basic lesson with you. Gain lesson 1419[/b].

323.action: [b][MOVE] HIDE[/b] in the back of the class, hoping the teacher won’t notice you
323.text: The instructor is explaining the sacrifice required to tap into life mana. Gain lesson 1419[/b].

324.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to get a better view of the surrounding area
324.text: The unruly terrain to the north must be a product of perverse and often baffling geological processes. View page 40 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

325.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away from the golden predators with the tiny animal in hand
325.text: Your surprise tactic pays off, and the golden spiders don’t have time to react. The animal is trembling with fear. Gain animal 817[/b].

326.text: It only takes a moment for the animal to realize that you’re the predator in this situation, and with a spin of their web they’re rappelling down the canyon. Gain 1 morale.

327.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the chest off the ledge onto the path
327.text: The chest lands with a thud, disarming the trap set underneath. Gain either 1 engage[/b] or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

328.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the slow sentient
328.text: The sentient makes a feeble attempt to catch you, but you easily evade them. As you do, you’re drawn to the sweet smell of the nearby lotus. Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse. Go north to 333[/b].

329.text: Clearly exhausted, they mumble something about falling off course while looking for a legendary cave. With one of their arms in your reassuring grasp, you gather what information you can and head east to 467[/b]. Gain sentient 1313[/b] and quest 1670[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

033.text: Even with a running start, you barely manage to clear the gap. Move deeper into the planet to cave 093[/b].

330.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the button on the device
330.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

331.text: You’re intimidated by the large gaps to the north and south, but the lotus has a calming effect on you. Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse. You may continue.

332.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the city through the primary gates
332.text: If you pay 1 engage[/b] or $1, the guards make way for you to enter city 530[/b]. Otherwise, the guards refuse to let you pass; gain 1 boost and continue.

333.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the shop through the front door
333.text: The proprietor is happy for the opportunity to sell to you. Go to interior 568[/b].

334.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the orb to see if it contains anything to aid the sentient
334.text: The orb shows your current position in the world, but it offers no insights into gold sentients. Look at page 4 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NE-2. Gain 1 boost.

335.text: No one stops or notices you as you covertly enter the stall. Go to interior 569[/b].

336.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] into the depths of the gap
336.text: As you descend deeper into the darkening abyss, the silence of the world above is replaced by the sound of a crowd cheering. You drop down into a hidden cavern filled with sentients. Go to cave 085[/b] and gain 1 morale.

337.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the Traveler about the possibility of escaping this planet
337.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “Instead of leaving, you could just save up enough coins—or acquire them in a morally ambiguous way—to buy or build a home.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1600[/b] (place it in the center).

338.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] your way into the resort using a tether
338.text: When you reach the top, a guard peers over the ledge. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay 1 engage
choices.outcome: The guard helps you up (go to interior 570[/b]).

choices.option: Push the button on the runecaster hovering above the resort
choices.outcome: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 help[/b]. Sensing your good intentions, the guard helps you into the resort; go to interior 570[/b].

choices.option: Pay $3
choices.outcome: The guard pockets the coins, leads you inside the resort, and subtly gestures toward an ornate ring. Go to interior 570[/b].

339.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with the artifact in hand
339.text: In a blur of motion, you swipe the artifact and leave pursuers cursing you in your wake. Gain curse 1393[/b]. If you pay 4 boost, your attempts to use the artifact are successful (gain item 999[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

034.text: The sentinel might as well be a wall of muscle and armor; you can dance in front of them all you want, but you can’t move past them. Gain 1 boost and continue.

340.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] the sailboat out of the mud
340.text: The owner of the sailboat is grateful for your assistance, and they offer you either one of the contents of the nearby treasure chest they recently refilled (gain item 1151[/b]) or a calming quest westward to the horn rocks (gain 1 move[/b] and quest 1676[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply).

341.text: Your spirited performance delights the judges, and they welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the engage-TRADE[/b][/b] action.

342.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] onto a ferry heading into the city
342.text: No one notices you sneak aboard, but trying to blend in among the gold sentients on the ferry is quite difficult. Go to city 529[/b].

343.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] across the canal to the north shore
343.text: The water tastes slightly brackish. Go to 507[/b].

344.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the shoreline, keeping an eye on the city’s reflection in the water
344.text: When you reach the shoreline, your suspicions are confirmed—the “city” in the distance is a well-crafted mirage. When you point this out to a local, they offer you a mischievous glance. Depending on who you ask, they say, the illusion was either created to confuse invaders or to make the land of the gold sentients appear more opulent than it really is. Impressed at your perception, the sentient teaches you a lesson that leads to a related spell. Gain lesson 1426[/b].

345.text: The beast tries to limp away, but a bullet has shattered one of its legs. A gust of wind takes the hunters away, leaving you with the suffering animal. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all help[/b] results. If you pay 1 help[/b], gain animal 836[/b]. Otherwise, lose 1 morale and gain 1 boost as the animal dies in your arms.

346.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the building, bracing against the wind
346.text: You approach the curious tower. Choose one:

choices.option: Enter the front door
choices.outcome: Go to interior 076[/b].

choices.option: Pay 1 boost to scale the exterior of the building and enter a second-story window
choices.outcome: The wind proves a constant impediment, but you go to interior 077[/b].

347.text: You take your shoes off and walk along the edge of the water. When you look up, you realize that the spiky rock in the distance isn’t a rock at all—it’s a massive sand centipede. You need to be careful about moving north. Gain 1 boost and 1 move[/b].

348.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the device
348.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

349.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to get a better view of the surrounding area
349.text: View page 35 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

035.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] around the trap toward the barrier
035.text: The cave is eerily quiet, and you’re disappointed to find the barrier is unyielding. Gain 1 boost and continue.

350.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] blindly into the pitch-black of the cave
350.text: You’re increasingly overwhelmed by claustrophobia as you move deeper and deeper inside toward a red light. Lose 1 morale and go to cave 029[/b].

351.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to view the surrounding area
351.text: The view from this vantage is at turns idyllic and fantastical. View page 44 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost. You may continue.

352.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the button on the device
352.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

353.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to look around
353.text: The view of this lush corner of the world was well worth the climb, even if some of it is obscured behind clouds. View page 44 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

354.text: You notice a yellow rune etched into a nearby stone, but there isn’t much more to note about the area. Gain 1 boost and continue.

355.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] into the ship through a small hole in the side
355.text: The inside of the wreckage is in shambles, and you barely have enough room to turn around and move back outside. The good news is that the locker containing your power armor is still intact. The bad news is that you’ll need to cleave the wreckage in half to get to it. Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

356.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north toward the cove on the right
356.text: Choose one based on previous actions:

choices.option: The sea centipede is no longer an obstacle
choices.outcome: Go to 375[/b] and gain 2 move[/b].

choices.option: You haven’t neutralized the sea centipede and you pay 1 look
choices.outcome: You notice the gaping mouth in the water and swim around it to 375[/b].

choices.option: You haven’t neutralized the sea centipede and you don’t pay 1 look
choices.outcome: The beast swallows you (lose 1 health) and spits you out in cave 046[/b].

357.action: [b][MOVE] CHASE[/b] away the animal (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
357.text: You make yourself big, spooking the animal. The residents of the house don’t seem happy about your intrusion. You may go north to 376[/b].

358.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the Traveler for information about escaping this planet
358.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “Instead of leaving, why not find a home for yourself here?” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1600[/b] (place it in the center).

359.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the sentient without startling them
359.text: When the sentient sees you, they ask if you have any flora or food to use as bait: You may lose a token from a flora or food card to give part of it to the sentient to attract fish. If you do, gain 1 morale and 1 health. Otherwise, gain 1 boost.

036.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] blindly into the pitch black of the cave
036.text: You quickly realize that this isn’t a short passage, and you return to the entrance. Gain 1 boost and continue.

360.action: [b][MOVE] WANDER[/b] around the hot spring, avoiding the boiling water
360.text: The unique properties of the water could make for interesting crafting. Gain item 1183[/b].

361.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the device
361.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

362.text: You let the tide gently push you to and from the various wildlife. You brace yourself against the pink flower, and to your surprise it floats free of the soil in your hand. Gain flora 1071[/b].

363.text: Go north to 631[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

364.text: Go north to 637[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

365.text: Go north to 643[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

366.text: Go north to 649[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

367.text: Go north to 655[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

368.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] northwest on the ocean surface
368.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b] (058[/b]); anything else (061[/b]).

369.text: You tap into the enormous power emanating from the elemental, summoning aid from your crewmates. Their visages are projected across the planet to your location. Each player who has a wood composition card (in their grid or reserve) or pays 2 boost is considered summoned. If this is a solo game, you may select one unused starting character card (1435[/b]–1440[/b]) to act as a summoned player. Summoned players may temporarily place challenge dice in their grid as if they were on your location, but only you suffer penalties from the elemental. Summoned players remain summoned until you perform any action other than overpower-SLAY[/b][/b]. Continue.

037.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the gate out of your way
037.text: You can push the gate all you want, but it isn’t going anywhere. Gain 1 boost and continue.

370.text: The stream is shallow but full of slippery rocks. A hearty gulp of the fresh springwater rejuvenates you before you crest the hill. Gain 1 health and go to 300[/b].

371.text: A jolt of electricity sends you sprawling back to shore. Suffer 1 heat damage and gain 1 boost; you may continue.

372.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] from one green lily pad to the next
372.text: You safely reach the other side, avoiding any predators that may lurk in the water. Go north to 302[/b].

373.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the animal to follow you
373.text: With a playful splash of water and some chin scratches, the animal is eager to follow you. Gain animal 841[/b].

374.action: [b][MOVE] CHASE[/b] away the animals (if the animals are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
374.text: You make yourself big, spooking the animals. Gain 1 morale; you may go north to 304[/b].

375.text: You duck behind the rocks, and soon the boat passes you, heading east. With the captain’s attention at the helm, you could catch them off guard by hijacking or raiding the vessel (gain either 1 take[/b] or 1 overpower[/b], then continue). Alternatively, you could plan to move away from the boat (gain 1 move[/b]).

376.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the building through the front door
376.text: The owner looks up at you from a workbench and asks how they can help. Continue on interior 571[/b] with the engage-TRADE[/b][/b], help-CRAFT[/b][/b], or overpower-RAID[/b][/b] action.

377.text: You grab onto the large flower when you land. The flower’s exterior is cool to the touch, but the inside contains a magma-like substance that splashes onto you. Suffer 1 heat damage and gain flora 1069[/b].

378.text: The sentients don’t see you, and you listen to their antics as they try to sell to other travelers. Each merchant specializes in a different type of item. There are vendors for crystals, tools, weapons, garments, maps, and even flora. Their prices seem reasonable, and they’re constantly shouting over each other. Gain 1 engage[/b] and continue.

379.text: Your aimless amble brings you over to a pink lotus on the edge of a rock. The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

038.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] around the trap toward the barrier
038.text: You try not to look down at the vast void below the path. As you pass the trap, though, the stairs disappear and the roots quickly retract. Gain 1 boost and continue.

380.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the animal away from the ledge
380.text: The creature is disoriented, lost in its pain. It can barely move, but you’re able to guide it gently into a less precarious position. Gain 2 help[/b] and continue.

381.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] the vehicle into the current
381.text: The controls of this vessel will require some practice. Gain vehicle 1013[/b] with 1 boost on it.

382.text: A vibrant pink flower catches your eye while you stroll. You unearth the vegetation, shaking dirt from its roots. A nearby sentient sees what you’ve done and smites you. Gain flora 1067[/b] and curse 1386[/b].

383.text: The shy sentient ducks behind the tree, but curiosity gets the best of them. They explain that they run the nearby lighthouse, and recently they’ve noticed a curious box of pure light to the north. Gain quest 1672[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

384.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with the treasure chest in hand
384.text: You move quickly in case this is a trap, grabbing the chest and scampering into the bushes. Gain item 1034[/b].

385.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the ruins, gingerly avoiding rubble and debris
385.text: Nature has long since overtaken these ruins, with moss and vines in every crack of the old stones. Go to interior 544[/b].

386.action: [b][MOVE] WANDER[/b] a little off the path
386.text: Among the wealth of flora you find a vine plump with ripe fruit. Gain flora 1059[/b].

387.text: The animals drift closer to each other as you approach—a defensive position—but they soon relax and go back to their meal. You notice that each animal is tagged with a symbol that looks like a farmhouse. Perhaps they wandered free of their farm? Gain 1 boost and go west to 700[/b].

388.text: The bridge is excellent cover for you to wait until the guards change shifts. When they do, you cross the river, emerging safely onto 780[/b].

389.action: [b][MOVE] CHASE[/b] the insects away from the flowers
389.text: Now that you’re closer to the flowers, you can understand why the insects were attracted to them. The flowers have a powerful odor, giving you a surge of adrenaline. Gain 1 health and 1 boost.

039.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] blindly into the pitch black of the cave
039.text: You quickly realize that this isn’t a short passage, and you return to the entrance. Gain 1 boost and continue.

390.text: You walk along the edge of the wall, and you’re surprised to find a small hole at the base. You may wiggle through it to go west to 787[/b].

391.text: In the shade of the wall, no one notices you slowly searching for footholds. You finally pull yourself over the top and into a busy street. Go to 788[/b].

392.text: The path leads you through a small gate in the side of the wall—it seems that people don’t often travel this way. Choose one:Move into the city to 790[/b].Follow the path north to 393[/b].Follow the path east to 706[/b].

393.text: You tap into the enormous power emanating from the elemental, summoning aid from your crewmates. Their visages are projected across the planet to your location. Each player who has a metal composition card (in their grid or reserve) or pays 2 boost is considered summoned. If this is a solo game, you may select one unused starting character card (1435[/b]–1440[/b]) to act as a summoned player. Summoned players may temporarily place challenge dice in their grid as if they were on your location, but only you suffer penalties from the elemental. Summoned players remain summoned until you perform any action other than overpower-SLAY[/b][/b]. Continue.

394.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] into the ship through a small hole in the side
394.text: The inside of the wreckage is in shambles, and you barely have enough room to turn around and move back outside. The good news is that the locker containing your power armor is still intact. The bad news is that you’ll need to cleave the wreckage in half to get to it. Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

395.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] north against the powerful magnets
395.text: The invisible resistance makes for an arduous journey north, but on the other side, you are delighted to see an animal similar to a greyhound of Old Earth lounging near some decorative banners. Go to 396[/b].

396.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to enter through the open roof
396.text: You scale the tower, gripping tightly around its circumference. Before you slip inside, you realize that you can see for a great distance. View page 35 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost. Then go to interior 572[/b].

397.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with the lotus in hand
397.text: With a loud slurping sound, you pull the lotus from the mud and take off running. Gain flora 1159[/b] and curse 1387[/b].

398.text: The perilous path leads to some tense moments between you and southbound sentients. Go to 399[/b].

399.text: The climb alongside the waterfall is short but technically demanding. Go to 400[/b].

040.text: It’s impossible to climb out of the cavern. You simply shield your eyes from a blinding light, and when you open them, you have teleported to somewhere new. Go to 157[/b]; if you have a previous location card for reference, return it to the box.

400.text: It takes a few minutes for you to emerge above the clouds. View page 31 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

401.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the nearest device
401.text: As long as you keep your finger on the button, a wave of information is transferred into your mind. You learn that there is an elemental to the east and a trial directly north of it. Gain 2 boost.

402.action: [b][MOVE] WANDER[/b] along the edge of the wall toward a small gateway
402.text: A shivering gatekeeper simply shakes their head. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all engage[/b] or all overpower[/b] results. You may pay 1 engage[/b] to give them a warm hug or 1 overpower[/b] to shove them out of the way; if you do, go east to 621[/b]. Otherwise, gain 1 boost and continue.

403.text: A jolt of electricity strikes as you grab the top of the fence (unless you disarmed the fence, suffer 1 heat damage). Go to 626[/b].

404.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the ruins, gingerly avoiding rubble and debris
404.text: You’re puzzled that anyone would let this prime real estate fall into ruin. Gain ability 1498[/b] and go to interior 545[/b].

405.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the device
405.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

406.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the nervous animal to safer shores
406.text: The tiny creature is absolutely terrified of being trapped on this island, so it accepts your guidance. Gain animal 834[/b].

407.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to view the surrounding area
407.text: You scamper up the tower to enjoy an unimpeded view of your surroundings. View page 44 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

408.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] from the top of the cliff into an open window
408.text: The dropoff from the cliff is steeper than it appeared from a distance, but you manage not to fall beyond the window ledge. Go to interior 559[/b].

409.text: From your perch on top of the spire, you can see quite far around you, including the vast sea to the south. View page 40 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost; you may continue.

041.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] a concealed door in the shadows
041.text: A door is labeled with a symbol depicting a centipede biting its own tail. The door slides open, revealing a very small, dark room with no other exit. Choose one:

choices.option: Enter the room and push the “up” button
choices.outcome: The door shuts behind you, and the entire room begins to move toward the surface of the planet, but not straight up. It finally opens into a small room. Go to interior 563[/b].

choices.option: Enter the room and push the “down” button
choices.outcome: The door shuts behind you, and the entire room begins to move deeper into the planet. It finally opens into a gaping tunnel. Go deeper into the planet to cave 043[/b].

choices.option: Ignore the room and instead walk over to the well-trafficked market
choices.outcome: Continue with the engage-TRADE[/b][/b] action.

410.text: The result of you entering the building is based on whether anyone is inside. Proceed if you already know this status; if not, roll a challenge die to determine the status randomly:

choices.option: No one is home (blank challenge die)
choices.outcome: Proceed to interior 573[/b].

choices.option: Someone is home (non-blank challenge die)
choices.outcome: The startled family shoves you back outside and locks the door. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all take[/b] results. If you pay 1 take[/b], gain item 1164[/b] as you avoid the slammed door.

411.action: [b][MOVE] FOLLOW[/b] the path up to the runestone
411.text: A small sentient with bark-like skin looks at the runestone with reverence and pride. They explain something to you in a language you don’t understand—they keep pointing at multiple locations to the south and west. Gain 1 boost and continue.

412.text: The paths are well-traveled, and you hope to find some loose change in the bushes nearby. You’re in luck! Gain $3.

413.text: You saunter around the large flower, enjoying the salty breeze. Gain 1 morale and continue.

414.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the old tower to get a better view
414.text: From the top of the tower you ponder what geological forces shaped this peculiar terrain. View page 40 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

415.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the device
415.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

416.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the chest into the water
416.text: As heavy as it is, the chest is also quite buoyant. If you move east through the water, you can easily take the chest with you (gain item 1034[/b] and go to 150[/b]). Otherwise, gain 1 boost and continue.

417.text: You tiptoe up the staircase behind the sentient and hover in their shadow as a gatekeeper lets them through. You find yourself inside the bowels of the planet near a vast underground city. Go to cave 094[/b].

418.action: [b][MOVE] HIDE[/b] inside the skull of the animal in case a predator lurks nearby
418.text: You wait a while in the skull, but no danger emerges. You’re distracted by an orange glow in the mud at your feet, and with a slurp you extract an old crystal. Gain item 1162[/b].

419.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to view the surrounding area
419.text: Ample handholds and horizontal bars aid your ascent up the tower scaffolding. View page 36 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

042.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] some buttons on the console
042.text: Nine of the screens are instantly filled with a map that pinpoints each of the images on the screens. View page 7 of the Book of Vantages and gain 1 boost.

420.text: The animal trots northwest, and you follow. Go to 610[/b].

421.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the animals to the west
421.text: You steer the animals away from the precipice and back to their herd. Gain 1 morale and go to 610[/b].

422.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the green gateway to the west
422.text: Proceed based on whether or not you’ve disarmed the gateway:

choices.option: The gateway is disarmed
choices.outcome: Go to 615[/b].

choices.option: The gateway is armed
choices.outcome: Lose 2 health and go to 615[/b].

423.text: As you stroll, you keep expecting someone to return to the construction site, but no one ever does. You try to decide whether you’re in the mood to build something or would rather just walk away with some of the wood. Gain either 1 help[/b] or 1 take[/b]; you may continue.

424.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the first device
424.text: Each time you push the button, you hear a sound coming from the loose wire. It seems that you need to connect to the wire for the device to work. Gain either 1 engage[/b] or 1 take[/b]; you may continue.

425.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the device
425.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

426.text: The creature senses that you don’t seek to cause it harm, and it seems to want to show you something. It leads you east, winding through some towering plants before depositing you underwater in front of a radiant flora. Go to 638[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

427.text: You dive below the surface, following the long stalks of the flora. Go east to 633[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

428.text: You dive just below the waves. Go east to 634[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

429.text: The choppy water is calm just below the surface. Go east to 635[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

043.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] the passage toward the surface
043.text: You rush out of the tunnel. When you pause to catch your breath, you find yourself at the beginning of a maze. Go to cave 093[/b].

430.text: You hoped to avoid the waterspouts underwater, but they twist even more aggressively under the surface. Go east to 636[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

431.text: You tap into the enormous power emanating from the elemental, summoning aid from your crewmates. Their visages are projected across the planet to your location. Each player who has a leaf composition card (in their grid or reserve) or pays 2 boost is considered summoned. If this is a solo game, you may select one unused starting character card (1435[/b]–1440[/b]) to act as a summoned player. Summoned players may temporarily place challenge dice in their grid as if they were on your location, but only you suffer penalties from the elemental. Summoned players remain summoned until you perform any action other than overpower-SLAY[/b][/b]. Continue.

432.action: [b][MOVE] FOLLOW[/b] the footsteps in the sand
432.text: The footsteps lead northwest into the forest. Go to 109[/b].

433.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] the boat into the current
433.text: You feel at home at the helm of this fine vessel. Unfortunately, it’s technically not your vessel, and the owner curses you from the shore. Gain vehicle 1014[/b] and curse 1388[/b].

434.text: You find a wealth of resources in the cove. Gain either a stone (1179[/b]), a piece of wood (1180[/b]), a leaf (1181[/b]), some fresh spring water (1183[/b]), or the breeze itself (1212[/b]).

435.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] east across the floating stones
435.text: The stones lead into a dark passage through the pillar of stone. Roll 5 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. If you pay 1 look[/b], you find something in the darkness (gain item 1263[/b]). Go east to 734[/b].

436.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the device
436.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

437.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the hypnotized animals safely back to the shore
437.text: The animals are startled to see you emerge from the surf but relieved when you offer aid to bring them to shore. The mother deposits a blue crystal at your feet in appreciation. Gain item 1160[/b].

438.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] up to one of the floating stones
438.text: When you reach the stone, you cautiously put your hand underneath, wary of the weight of the rock crushing every bone in your arm. But nothing happens. On a whim, you lay beneath the stone and close your eyes. When you open them, you’re filled with new knowledge. Gain spell 1368[/b].

439.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with the artifact in hand
439.text: As you scamper away with the book, you find yourself right back where you started. Gain 1 boost.

044.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] the passage toward the surface
044.text: You walk aimlessly across a series of bridges. Go to cave 098[/b].

440.action: [b][MOVE] CHASE[/b] away the animals so you can proceed north (if the animals are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
440.text: You make yourself big, spooking the animals, though they hover a safe distance away as if waiting for you to leave so they can return to the lava flow. Go to 441[/b].

441.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] the boat into the current
441.text: You feel at home at the helm of this fine vessel. Gain vehicle 1014[/b] and $4.

442.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to view the surrounding area
442.text: The world is quiet as you scale the tower. View page 37 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

443.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north as the beast charges by (reduce this to 1 if the animal is no longer an obstacle)
443.text: At the top of the dune, you’ll be able to see if more creatures are approaching. Go to 444[/b].

444.text: The creature doesn’t move despite your abrupt approach. It’s in great pain. Gain either 1 help[/b] or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

445.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north toward a golden goliath
445.text: You are filled with a sense of dread as you follow the path toward some sort of monster. Go to 446[/b].

446.text: You tap into the enormous power emanating from the elemental, summoning aid from your crewmates. Their visages are projected across the planet to your location. Each player who has a gold composition card (in their grid or reserve) or pays 2 boost is considered summoned. If this is a solo game, you may select one unused starting character card (1435[/b]–1440[/b]) to act as a summoned player. Summoned players may temporarily place challenge dice in their grid as if they were on your location, but only you suffer penalties from the elemental. Summoned players remain summoned until you perform any action other than overpower-SLAY[/b][/b]. Continue.

447.text: You have a wistful urge for ice cream as you walk into the sunset. Go to 503[/b].

448.text: You are curious to see what you find under the waves. Go west to 655[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

449.text: You submerge yourself near some large cylindrical objects. Go west to 656[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

045.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] the tunnel toward the surface
045.text: To your surprise, as you climb upward the intermittent rumbling doesn’t stop—but it does change frequency. Go to cave 096[/b].

450.text: Something lurks below the surface, and you dive below for a better look. Go west to 657[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

451.text: Seaweed tickles you as you plunge into the water. Go west to 658[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

452.text: Go west to 659[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

453.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the building through the front door
453.text: The sentients, focused on their metallurgy, don’t appreciate the interruption. Continue with one of the following actions:

choices.option: move--DASH away after grabbing the closest item
choices.outcome: Gain item 874[/b].

choices.option: engage--PERSUADE the sentients that you’re here to pick up your armor (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
choices.outcome: Gain item 874[/b].

choices.option: overpower--RAID the foundry
choices.outcome: Furious, the sentients fight back with smoldering tools. Roll 5 skill dice and gain all move[/b] results. Suffer 1 heat damage unless you pay 1 move[/b]. Either gain one of the following items, or gain two of those items and curse 1394[/b]: a battery pack (874[/b]), a scythe (938[/b]), armor (976[/b]).

454.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the device
454.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

455.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the gatehouse through the front door
455.text: The gatekeeper points to a sign showing that there’s a $2 toll to enter the capital city. If you pay, go northeast to 762[/b] and gain 1 random skill. If you don’t pay, gain 1 boost and continue.

456.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] along the shoreline toward the structure
456.text: To avoid watchful eyes and ears, you tiptoe close to the ridge until you reach the base of the arch. A wooden pathway leads inside the building. Go to interior 576[/b].

457.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] east through gaps in the old city ruins
457.text: It’s a tight fit through the break in the wall, but you’re rewarded with a striking view of a towering dome to the north. Go to 763[/b].

458.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to view the surrounding area
458.text: The tower has an abundance of bars and rungs to aid your ascent. View page 42 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

459.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] into the wreckage through a small hole in the side
459.text: The inside of the wreckage is in shambles, and you barely have enough room to turn around and move back outside. The good news is that the locker containing your power armor is still intact. The bad news is that you’ll need to cleave the wreckage in half to get to it. Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

046.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] the passage toward the surface
046.text: The intermittent rumbling in the tunnel gives way to the irregular crashing of rocks. Go to cave 079[/b].

460.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] an unattended boat into the current
460.text: You feel at home at the helm of this fine vessel. Unfortunately, it’s technically not your vessel, and the shipyard workers yell some colorful language at you. Gain vehicle 1014[/b] and curse 1386[/b].

461.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the moth in the hopes of healing it later
461.text: The animal dutifully follows you. Gain animal 823[/b].

462.text: The sentient knows a trail that avoids the strong headwind. Go north to 463[/b].

463.text: You tap into the enormous power emanating from the elemental, summoning aid from your crewmates. Their visages are projected across the planet to your location. Each player who has a wind composition card (in their grid or reserve) or pays 2 boost is considered summoned. If this is a solo game, you may select one unused starting character card (1435[/b]–1440[/b]) to act as a summoned player. Summoned players may temporarily place challenge dice in their grid as if they were on your location, but only you suffer penalties from the elemental. Summoned players remain summoned until you perform any action other than overpower-SLAY[/b][/b]. Continue.

464.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] a wind chime and swing into an open window
464.text: Swinging on the wind chime briefly brings you back to the low-gravity playgrounds of your childhood. Gain 1 morale and 2 move[/b]; go to interior 577[/b].

465.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse. You may continue.

466.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the gap to the north or add 3 to the cost and [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] north over the wall

choices.option: ENTER
choices.outcome: Two bandits jump you from either side, leaving you with a bruise on your head and an empty purse. Lose 1 health and lose $3; go to 467[/b].

choices.option: SCALE
choices.outcome: Go to 467[/b].

467.text: Conveniently, you find some thick cords on the back side of the hill that aid your ascent. Just as you reach the top, one of them snaps off the chest. Fortunately, you hang on; even better, the chest is now disarmed. Continue with either the engage-PICK[/b][/b] or overpower-FORCE[/b][/b] action, reducing the cost by 3.

468.text: As you wander, detach a lantern from an arm-level branch. Gain item 1187[/b].

469.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the device
469.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

047.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] toward the surface through a mine
047.text: As you near the end of a long, abandoned mineshaft, you see glowing yellow lights and hear the steady clanking of metal against rock. Go to cave 087[/b].

470.text: You make yourself big, spooking the animal away from the water. Gain 1 morale; you may go north to 509[/b].

471.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the chest onto its side
471.text: To your delight, the chest pops open. Gain vehicle 957[/b].

472.text: Some large animals plod upstream as you swim by, paying no attention. Go to 101[/b].

473.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the city through the primary entrance
473.text: A kaleidoscope of tropical birds perches in the trees near the entrance, each warbling their own lilting tune. Go to city 526[/b].

474.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the device
474.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

475.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the animal back to its parent to the north
475.text: You lead the tiny creature toward the falls, where its parent gives you an appreciative lick. Gain 2 morale.

476.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the building through the front door
476.text: A green sentient is standing by the window, facing west. They don’t seem to notice you. Go to interior 510[/b].

477.text: You hold your breath and submerge yourself, coming eye to eye with a massive animal. Go south to 642[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

478.text: As you dive underwater, you realize that the water here is far deeper than you guessed. Go south to 648[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

479.text: The jellyfish below the surface present a concern, but you will be able to see them better underwater. Go south to 654[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

048.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] the tunnel toward the surface, using your dexterity to cross a narrow gap
048.text: At the end of the tunnel, amber-colored light pours up from underneath a ledge. Go to cave 084[/b].

480.text: Sunlight streams through the clear water, guiding you beneath the waves. Go south to 660[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

481.action: [b][MOVE] DODGE[/b] fireballs to move north around the volcano
481.text: The seisms of the ground and the occasional salvo of fireballs in your direction makes what would otherwise be a pleasant stroll potentially lethal. Go to 150[/b] and gain 1 morale.

482.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the button on the device
482.text: While the desperate sentients watch, your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

483.text: You make yourself big, spooking the animal. Gain 1 morale; you may go north to 152[/b].

484.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to view the surrounding area
484.text: The nearest tower extends high into the clouds. View page 37 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

485.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the treasure chest off the ledge
485.text: The chest lands with a thud. The hinge is slightly cracked, but opening it would require more force. Gain 1 overpower[/b] and continue.

486.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] the boat into the current
486.text: You steer the rowboat into the water. Gain vehicle 1014[/b] and $4.

487.action: [b][MOVE] FOLLOW[/b] the creature across the gap
487.text: You are a tangle of arms and legs as you use the three ropes to cross the gap. The mouse is delighted by your antics. Gain animal 834[/b] and go north to 276[/b].

488.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a chest out of the sand to get a better look
488.text: With the sand cleared, you have a better perspective on how to open the chest. Gain 1 engage[/b], 1 take[/b], or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

489.text: You make noise by pounding at the levitating device on the left, spooking the animals. Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster. Gain 1 morale and 2 overpower[/b]; you may go north to 278[/b].

049.action: [b][MOVE] WANDER[/b] around the cave, avoiding the spikes
049.text: As your feet squish into the soft cave floor, you brace yourself on a spike near the center. Your hand brushes against something metallic, and you are surprised to find an ornate ring wedged onto a spike. Gain item 991[/b].

490.text: You can’t resist getting a closer look at the large lotus. Something about it tells you that brewing the flower would have interesting results. Gain 2 help[/b] and continue.

491.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] into the ship through a small hole in the side
491.text: The inside of the wreckage is in shambles, and you barely have enough room to turn around and move back outside. The good news is that the locker containing your power armor is still intact. The bad news is that you’ll need to cleave the wreckage in half to get to it. Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

492.action: [b][MOVE] SLIDE[/b] north down the slippery slope
492.text: Unless you pay 1 move[/b], lose 1 health as you crash into the ground at the base of the valley. Go to 351[/b].

493.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the animal down the mountain
493.text: The animal creates a much easier path for you to follow than slipping down the snowy slope. Lose 1 curse or gain 1 morale; you may go north to 352[/b].

494.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the chest off the ledge
494.text: The chest shatters open on the brittle rocks below. Some of the contents were lost to the snow, but you manage to find a shiny red crystal. Gain item 1165[/b].

495.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the steep cliff
495.text: The climb down the icy cliff face is unforgiving and the handholds are fewer in number than you’d like, but at least the view to the north is spectacular. Go to 354[/b] and gain 1 morale.

496.action: [b][MOVE] WANDER[/b] around the area, your feet sinking into the snow
496.text: You walk past the lotus over to the orange rune on the left. You focus on it, and suddenly you feel a connection to your crewmates. Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

497.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the warehouse through the front door
497.text: You blend in by picking up a barrel and putting it down inside. Go to interior 578[/b].

498.text: You tap into the enormous power emanating from the elemental, summoning aid from your crewmates. Their visages are projected across the planet to your location. Each player who has a sinew composition card (in their grid or reserve) or pays 2 boost is considered summoned. If this is a solo game, you may select one unused starting character card (1435[/b]–1440[/b]) to act as a summoned player. Summoned players may temporarily place challenge dice in their grid as if they were on your location, but only you suffer penalties from the elemental. Summoned players remain summoned until you perform any action other than overpower-SLAY[/b][/b]. Continue.

499.text: The result of you entering the building is based on whether anyone is inside. Proceed if you already know this status; if not, roll a challenge die to determine the status randomly:

choices.option: No one is home (blank challenge die)
choices.outcome: Go to interior 579[/b]; on your next turn, you may not choose the engage-DEFUSE[/b][/b] action there.

choices.option: Someone is home (non-blank challenge die)
choices.outcome: The startled family shoves you back outside and locks the door. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all take[/b] results. If you pay 1 take[/b], gain item 982[/b] as you avoid the slammed door.

050.text: Even with a running start, you barely manage to clear the gap. Move deeper into the planet to cave 079[/b].

500.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to view the surrounding area
500.text: You are careful to avoid burning yourself as you approach the tower, which is warm to the touch. View page 33 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

501.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the device
501.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Suffer 1 heat damage and gain 2 skills matching the rune.

502.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the treasure chest off the ledge
502.text: Even after taking a tumble, the chest retains most of its durability. It might be best simply to take it apart. Gain 1 take[/b] and continue.

503.text: The orb is a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 4 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NE-1. Gain 1 boost.

504.text: You’re too late to save their boat by the time you reach it, but you’re able to guide the survivors back to shore. One small wood sentient pledges to repay the favor. Gain sentient 1360[/b] and 1 morale.

505.text: When you get close to the sentient, they playfully splash you, then stop to see your response. Seeing your bewilderment, they mention that they closed a major business deal today and wanted to celebrate with a dip in the ocean. Gain sentient 1320[/b].

506.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to view the surrounding area
506.text: There isn’t much tower to climb here, but you’re still greeted with a bird’s eye vantage. View page 34 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

507.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north from one sandbar to the next
507.text: A series of sandbars ensures your top half remains dry as you wade north. Go to 366[/b].

508.text: You threaten the poachers and chase them away. The large animal is grateful and proceeds to follow you around. Gain animal 847[/b].

509.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] into the ship through a small hole in the side
509.text: The inside of the wreckage is in shambles, and you barely have enough room to turn around and move back outside. The good news is that the locker containing your power armor is still intact. The bad news is that you’ll need to cleave the wreckage in half to get to it. Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

051.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] the pirate ship emerging from the mists
051.text: You remain perfectly quiet as you drift deeper into the dark mist in the direction opposite the pirate ship. Finally you’re in the clear. Gain ability 1485[/b] and 1 morale, then roll a skill die and go to where the tides take you: move[/b] (055[/b]); look[/b] (059[/b]); engage[/b] (431[/b]); help[/b] (454[/b]); take[/b] (448[/b]); overpower[/b] (363[/b]).

051.action: [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] into the depths of the ocean, leaving all vehicles to the whim of the waves
051.text: Reserve all vehicle cards (if any) while you're underwater. You are enveloped by water. As your eyes adjust, you find yourself in an aquatic world. Go to either 636[/b] or 642[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

510.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
510.text: Before the sentient turns around, you reach for the water pouch on the nearby table. Gain item 858[/b] and exit to 476[/b].

511.text: You notice footprints on the rocks, followed by trampled flowers, but you lose the trail after that. Gain 1 move[/b] and continue with the look-SOLVE[/b][/b] action with a cost reduced by 1.

512.text: You gravitate toward the runestones, but you take your time, running your hands along the slick stone. To the left you find a peculiar arrow embedded in the rock. Gain item 1235[/b].

513.text: As you approach, the sentient urges you to stop. “I’m generating enough energy to power the entire metal kingdom— this is my choice, my gift!” Choose one:

choices.option: Leave the sentient alone
choices.outcome: They thank you by giving you the knowledge to share and create energy; gain lesson 1427[/b].

choices.option: Unchain the sentient
choices.outcome: In anger at your defiance, the sentient sends a surge of energy through the area. Suffer 1 heat damage and gain sentient 1327[/b].

514.text: From your vantage, you can see the ocean for a vast distance in all directions. View page 46 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost; you may continue with the overpower-RAID[/b][/b] action.

515.text: You feel a cool breeze from the other side of the arch, and you step forward into it. Go to 741[/b].

516.text: The view from the tree is concerning, as there are few signs of life in the arid desert surrounding you. Even the verdant waters to the south have receded, leaving behind rocky beaches. Gain 2 boost and continue.

517.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] the ship back to the time rift
517.text: The smelter is eager to see you take the reins in the cockpit, and they linger long enough for you to realize that they’re hoping to join you. The ship is even better than you imagined—the smelter and their team did an incredible job. Gain vehicle 1033[/b] and sentient 1316[/b].

518.text: A cartographer beckons to you, showcasing world maps of various hotspots. You may lose 1 card with value $2 or greater from your grid or reserve to gain 1 map (lotus: item 1257[/b]; trials: 1261[/b]; flora: 1263[/b]). Either way, look at one of these pages in the Book of Vantages: lotus map (14), trial map (18), or flora map (20); the cartographer notes your current location (view page 35 in the Book of Vantages).

519.text: A dozen petrified sentients train in a climbing gym. Choose one:

choices.option: Practice your climbing skills, which the sentients are doing to prepare for their rite of passage to the north
choices.outcome: Gain ability 1468[/b].

choices.option: Tuck a pretty plant off the side of the city tree into your pocket while the sentients are distracted
choices.outcome: Gain flora 1047[/b].

052.action: [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] into the depths of the ocean, leaving all vehicles to the whim of the waves
052.text: Reserve all vehicle cards (if any) while you're underwater. You are enveloped by water. As your eyes adjust, you find yourself in an aquatic world. Go to either 654[/b] or 660[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

520.text: A messenger service is overwhelmed with outgoing and incoming requests. Choose one:

choices.option: Learn about how worldwide communication works
choices.outcome: Energy sentients are able to travel through the towers scattered across the world to swiftly relay messages: Gain lesson 1428[/b].

choices.option: Follow through on one of the many unclaimed requests
choices.outcome: Gain 1 random skill and quest 1658[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

521.text: This “memory uploader” is a foreign concept to you. Choose one:

choices.option: Approach a sentient to discuss memory uploaders
choices.outcome: Circuit sentients stay physically connected to their mainframe—and to each other—if possible, but when they return after unplugging, they upload what they learned. Gain 3 boost.

choices.option: Sell some of your memories
choices.outcome: Gain $6.

522.text: The locksmith seems significantly more protective of the locks they sell than their keys. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.option: Pay $6 for a key
choices.outcome: Gain item 918[/b].

choices.option: Dash away with a pair of shackles
choices.outcome: Gain item 937[/b].

523.text: Students gather at the adventure academy for a class about bouldering—that is, dodging boulders. Choose one:

choices.option: Learn to dodge deadly boulders effectively
choices.outcome: Gain ability 1466[/b].

choices.option: Dodge a real boulder as a volunteer
choices.outcome: Roll 1 challenge die. If the result is health, lose 1 health. Otherwise gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

524.text: The weapons depot owner is eager to showcase their wares. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay $4 for a mace
choices.outcome: Gain item 969[/b].

choices.option: Dash away with a mace
choices.outcome: Gain item 969[/b] and curse 1392[/b].

choices.option: Wander around the store to see what you find
choices.outcome: Gathering dust on a table off to the side is a small crystal. The store owner tells you to take it. Gain item 1164[/b].

525.text: The runecastery offers you a runecaster if you agree to travel with it for a while. Choose one runecaster to gain: blue (1028[/b]), purple (1030[/b]), orange (1026[/b]), green (1029[/b]), yellow (1031[/b]), or red (1027[/b]).

526.text: Dozens of winged creatures flutter around an openair pet shop. The owner says that, despite the temptation, the flying beasts are too pretty to eat. They also warn you that the animals are untrained. Pay $1 to gain one of your choice: a fire swan (animal 816[/b]), an aether moth (animal 823[/b]), or a carrion gull (animal 820[/b]); otherwise gain 1 boost.

527.text: The spiritual healer takes your hand in their palms, takes a deep breath, and nods knowingly. Choose one:

choices.option: Follow the healer’s instructions
choices.outcome: After a simple ritual, you feel better almost immediately. Gain 2 health.

choices.option: Guide a fellow client of the healer, a vacationing circuit sentient
choices.outcome: Gain sentient 1310[/b] and 1 morale.

choices.option: Lose 1 flora from your grid or reserve to add to the healer’s medicinal supply
choices.outcome: Gain lesson 1420[/b] and $5.

528.text: The attendant at the trade route office looks up from a large book. Choose one:

choices.option: Share information from your travels on the surface
choices.outcome: Gain $3.

choices.option: Lose either $3 or 1 item from your grid or reserve to gain a map
choices.outcome: Gain item 1251[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location (view page 9 in the Book of Vantages; you are at the city in region P).

529.text: An attendant welcomes you inside the treasury. Choose one:

choices.option: Tour the treasury to learn about its history
choices.outcome: It began as an uneasy alliance between gold and circuit sentients, an alliance that has long since been broken by both sides. Gain 2 boost.

choices.option: Dash away from the long-winded attendant with some newly minted coins
choices.outcome: Gain $12.

053.action: [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] into the depths of the ocean, leaving all vehicles to the whim of the waves
053.text: Reserve all vehicle cards (if any) while you're underwater. You are enveloped by water. As your eyes adjust, you find yourself in an aquatic world. Go to either 635[/b] or 641[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

530.text: Three guild leaders try to recruit you. Choose one:

choices.option: Join the crafting guild
choices.outcome: Gain ability 1462[/b].

choices.option: Join the debating guild
choices.outcome: Gain ability 1463[/b].

choices.option: Join the spying guild
choices.outcome: Gain ability 1483[/b].

531.text: A wizened clockmaker launches into a detailed explanation about gears and time. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.option: Learn to manipulate time
choices.outcome: Gain lesson 1433[/b].

choices.option: Pay $5 for an old hourglass
choices.outcome: Gain item 987[/b].

054.action: [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] into the depths of the ocean, leaving all vehicles to the whim of the waves
054.text: Reserve all vehicle cards (if any) while you're underwater. You are enveloped by water. As your eyes adjust, you find yourself in an aquatic world. Go to either 653[/b] or 659[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

541.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the crumbling central tower of the ruins
541.text: You scramble up the tower, old stone crumbling beneath your fingernails. On the way up, you grab a bedroll hanging from a vine (gain item 971[/b]). At the top, view page 45 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

542.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the crumbling central tower of the ruins
542.text: You scramble up the tower, old stone crumbling beneath your fingernails. At the top, view page 35 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

543.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the crumbling central tower of the ruins
543.text: You scramble up the tower, old stone crumbling beneath your fingernails. On the way up, you grab the shackles from a rusty nail (gain item 937[/b]). At the top, view page 33 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

544.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the crumbling central tower of the ruins
544.text: You scramble up the tower, old stone crumbling beneath your fingernails. At the top, view page 43 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

545.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the crumbling central tower of the ruins
545.text: You scramble up the tower, old stone crumbling beneath your fingernails. On the way up, you grab a grappling claw (gain item 903[/b]). At the top, view page 44 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

546.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the crumbling central tower of the ruins
546.text: You scramble up the tower, old stone crumbling beneath your fingernails. You grab the large egg at the top (gain item 979[/b]) and look out over the treetops. View page 39 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

547.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the crumbling central tower of the ruins
547.text: You scramble up the tower, old stone crumbling beneath your fingernails. On the way up, you grab a trident (gain item 1089[/b]). At the top, view page 40 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

548.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the crumbling central tower of the ruins
548.text: You scramble up the tower, old stone crumbling beneath your fingernails. On the way up, you grab a magic wand (gain item 981[/b]). At the top, view page 35 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

549.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north across the stream after exiting the tent
549.text: You grab the plump mushroom as you leave the tent. Exit to 108[/b], gaining item 1136[/b] as you leave.

055.action: [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] into the depths of the ocean, leaving all vehicles to the whim of the waves
055.text: Reserve all vehicle cards (if any) while you're underwater. You are enveloped by water. As your eyes adjust, you find yourself in an aquatic world. Go to either 631[/b] or 637[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

550.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the steep drop after exiting the tent
550.text: Exit down the sheer cliff face to 136[/b], gaining item 1041[/b] as you leave. Also gain 1 morale.

551.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the sheer cliff after exiting the tent
551.text: You grab a pair of boots on your way out of the tent (gain item 955[/b]), then make a not-so-fast getaway down the almost vertical cliff face to the swampland below. Exit to 230[/b] and gain 1 morale.

552.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] north across the desert after exiting the tent
552.text: You snag a rope as you leave the tent. Exit to 299[/b], gaining item 902[/b] as you leave.

553.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
553.text: You grab a map as you leave the room. Gain item 1257[/b] and exit to 115[/b].

554.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
554.text: You grab the spiky ball and leave the chamber. Gain item 1228[/b] and exit to 124[/b].

555.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] from the top of the spire quickly after grabbing the closest item
555.text: You haven’t seen snow in this area, but perhaps the snowshoes will help you in colder climates. Gain item 933[/b] and exit to 129[/b].

556.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
556.text: You stuff the sleeping bag under your arm and leave the house. Gain item 1040[/b] and exit to 204[/b].

557.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
557.text: One of the dice seems heavier than the other. Gain item 924[/b] and exit to 215[/b].

558.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing a nearby item

choices.option: Grab a playing card
choices.outcome: Gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack. Place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during overpower-DUEL[/b][/b] actions, which have further instructions. Exit to 266[/b].

choices.option: Grab the earpiece
choices.outcome: Gain item 878[/b] and exit to 266[/b].

559.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
559.text: You grab the goggles and quickly leave the room. Gain item 935[/b] and exit to 408[/b].

056.action: [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] into the depths of the ocean, leaving all vehicles to the whim of the waves
056.text: Reserve all vehicle cards (if any) while you're underwater. You are enveloped by water. As your eyes adjust, you find yourself in an aquatic world. Go to either 652[/b] or 658[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

560.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] after grabbing the item that will help you move around more efficiently
560.text: You are excited to try on the fancy shoes. Gain item 989[/b] and exit to 673[/b].

561.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
561.text: The steampunk goggles look like something from the past. Gain item 986[/b] and exit to 760[/b].

562.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
562.text: You pick up a small axe before leaving the forge. Gain item 1042[/b] and exit to 160[/b].

563.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] the bandit hideout into the clouds
563.text: On your way out of the room, you grab a blue ball from the cubby. Gain item 1228[/b]. Then, using no additional information, exit to 706[/b], 200[/b], 393[/b], 201[/b], or 205[/b].

564.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after attempting to grab the closest item
564.text: The nearby armor looks like it would fit you perfectly, but the security shield blocks you from touching it. You may pay 1 boost to disarm the shield; if you do, gain item 975[/b]. If you don’t, gain 1 boost. Either way, exit to 216[/b].

565.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
565.text: You grab a vial of green liquid. Gain item 861[/b] and exit to 239[/b].

566.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing an item that will help you move more freely
566.text: You hope the glider will support your weight. Gain vehicle 957[/b] and exit to 304[/b].

567.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
567.text: You grab the gloves and leave the classroom. Gain item 936[/b] and exit to 321[/b].

568.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
568.text: You snatch the goggles and exit the shop. Gain item 941[/b] and exit to 333[/b].

569.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
569.text: You grab the compass and nonchalantly stroll away. Gain item 968[/b] and exit to 335[/b].

057.action: [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] into the depths of the ocean, leaving all vehicles to the whim of the waves
057.text: Reserve all vehicle cards (if any) while you're underwater. You are enveloped by water. As your eyes adjust, you find yourself in an aquatic world. Go to either 645[/b] or 646[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

570.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
570.text: You slip the ring on your finger. Gain item 994[/b] and exit to 338[/b].

571.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
571.text: You steal the blowtorch and back out of the chamber. Gain item 870[/b] and exit to 376[/b].

572.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
572.text: You slip the goggles on your forehead and leave the observatory. Gain item 940[/b] and exit to 396[/b].

573.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing an item that will help you move around this area of the world
573.text: You’re happy to see some climbing equipment. Gain item 909[/b] and exit to 410[/b].

574.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
574.text: You pull on the armor—it’s a little snug. Gain item 976[/b] and exit to 453[/b].

575.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
575.text: You loop the binoculars around your neck. Gain item 972[/b] and either go back outside (455[/b]) or enter the city (762[/b]).

576.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
576.text: You gingerly pick up the explosive. Gain item 879[/b] and exit to 456[/b].

577.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing something from the desk
577.text: You have only a short time to decide whether the book (item 1045[/b]) or the map (item 1262[/b]) is more important to you. Gain one of them, then exit to 464[/b].

578.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
578.text: You grab the flippers and saunter away. Gain item 927[/b] and exit to 497[/b].

579.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
579.text: You loot the orange ring before leaving the home. Gain item 993[/b] and exit to 499[/b].

058.text: Gale-force winds whip the sea into a frenzy, but you fight through the waves. When the sky clears and the water calms, you find yourself drifting next to another survivor, a large shellfish. Gain animal 847[/b], then roll a skill die and go to where the tides take you: move[/b] (060[/b]); look[/b] (053[/b]); engage[/b] (430[/b]); help[/b] (454[/b]); take[/b] (368[/b]); overpower[/b] (381[/b]).

058.action: [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] into the depths of the ocean, leaving all vehicles to the whim of the waves
058.text: Reserve all vehicle cards (if any) while you're underwater. You are enveloped by water. As your eyes adjust, you find yourself in an aquatic world. Go to either 649[/b] or 655[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

580.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing a useful item for cold climates
580.text: You toss the ice skates over your shoulder. Gain item 951[/b] and exit to 613[/b].

581.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly out the back door, scooping up a large item as you leave
581.text: You stagger under the weight of the transducer. Gain item 948[/b] and exit to 492[/b].

582.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north after exiting out the back, grabbing the farthest item as you leave
582.text: You steal the net as you swim away. Gain item 932[/b] and exit north to 641[/b].

583.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the council, grabbing the package as you leave
583.text: Much to the dismay of the council, you rob them of the package in plain sight. Gain item 1034[/b] and exit to 778[/b].

584.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the nearby climbing shoes
584.text: You try to avoid stabbing yourself with the spiky shoes. Gain item 963[/b] and exit to 662[/b].

585.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
585.text: The key piques your interest. Gain item 996[/b] and exit to 676[/b].

586.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
586.text: The purple ring glows with a powerful energy. Gain item 995[/b] and exit to 682[/b].

587.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the oxygen mask
587.text: Swimming underwater will be much easier with this mask. Gain item 964[/b] and exit to 744[/b].

588.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after pulling the fishing net from the rafters
588.text: The net looks more decorative than useful, so the home’s owner probably won’t miss it. Gain item 911[/b] and exit to 737[/b].

589.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing an offering
589.text: You’re drawn to a large egg at the foot of the statue. Gain item 977[/b] and exit to 763[/b].

059.action: [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] into the depths of the ocean, leaving all vehicles to the whim of the waves
059.text: Reserve all vehicle cards (if any) while you're underwater. You are enveloped by water. As your eyes adjust, you find yourself in an aquatic world. Go to either 651[/b] or 657[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

590.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] quickly after grabbing the closest item
590.text: The climbing harness looks like it will hold your weight. Gain item 904[/b] and exit to 769[/b].

591.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] west, pocketing the ring as you leave
591.text: The large ring looks like it may fit better on your wrist than your finger. Gain item 990[/b] and exit to 780[/b].

592.text: As you circumnavigate the room, tiny golden flakes fall onto you, and your mind is flooded with someone else’s memory. Gain 1 boost, then gain 1 random skill and read the matching result:

choices.option: move
choices.outcome: You are a sand sentient competing in your first race, a young sand centipede tethered to your skiff. Continue.

choices.option: look
choices.outcome: You are a wood sentient summoning your courage to find the next handhold while scaling a towering tree. Continue.

choices.option: engage
choices.outcome: You are a stone sentient receiving a distant cloud message indicating that your brother is missing. Continue.

choices.option: help
choices.outcome: You are a circuit sentient reluctantly assisting another sentient with a simple question of quantum mechanics. Continue.

choices.option: take
choices.outcome: You are a fire sentient earning your first tattoo for a successful scavenging mission. Continue.

choices.option: overpower
choices.outcome: You are a water sentient challenged to fight a classmate whose respect you wish to earn. Continue.

596.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] around the sleeping dragon (if the dragon is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
596.text: You sneak silently around the dragon to reach a staircase. Go deeper into the planet to cave 047[/b].

597.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] after grabbing the most useful item for traveling
597.text: Gain item 1251[/b] before dashing up the stairs to the top of the lighthouse. View page 44 of the Book of Vantages, then exit to 305[/b].

060.action: [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] into the depths of the ocean, leaving all vehicles to the whim of the waves
060.text: Reserve all vehicle cards (if any) while you're underwater. You are enveloped by water. As your eyes adjust, you find yourself in an aquatic world. Go to either 632[/b] or 638[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

601.text: Your clothes stick to the brittle branches as you venture too close, and one breaks off into your hand. Gain flora 1065[/b].

602.text: You find an area along the frozen lake that can support your weight, and at the end of it is a sizable portion of your ship, completely exposed to the elements. Inside you find precious cargo—your power armor. You may replace your character with the corresponding card (captain[/b]: 1447[/b]; navigator[/b]: 1448[/b]; scholar[/b]: 1449[/b]; medic[/b]: 1450[/b]; engineer[/b]: 1451[/b]; marine[/b]: 1452[/b]); transfer all boost from your original character onto the new card. If you already have your power armor, instead gain 3 boost. The wreckage then sinks into the frozen lake; you may continue.

603.action: [b][MOVE] FOLLOW[/b] the source of the footprints
603.text: The tracks lead toward the birds and then take a sharp turn east; it appears that the source of the tracks left behind some of the wires the birds are gathering. Gain 1 boost; you may go east to 604[/b].

604.text: The sentient is startled for a moment as you enter their periphery, then they go back to staring at the yellow crystal in their hands. “I don’t want to talk about it. Not yet.” You have the feeling that they could use some silent company. You may spend 1 morale to go west to 603[/b] and gain sentient 1312[/b], or you may continue.

605.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the Traveler for information about the sentients
605.text: “These sinew sentients typically hunt in groups of three. They’re highly competitive, whether it’s hunting, dueling, entertaining, or even cooking.” Gain 2 boost and continue.

606.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] the sentient and run straight ahead
606.text: The sentient doesn’t attempt to follow you, and you skid into a cave. Go to cave 021[/b].

607.action: [b][MOVE] FOLLOW[/b] the animals through the snow
607.text: You jump from one giant indentation in the snow to the other. The extra movement keeps you warm. Go west to 606[/b], where you ignore cold damage upon arrival.

608.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the three buttons on the device
608.text: After you push the buttons, a series of lights guide you to plug the nozzles into your augsuit. Data flows into your implants, presented as an endlessly scrolling page of news and other information. You randomly select a link for your implant to download. Visit orb.stonemaiergames.com and enter 111[/b], 171[/b], or 208[/b].

609.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the sled free of the ice
609.text: After a few attempts, the sled breaks free of the ice. Gain vehicle 931[/b].

061.action: [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] into the depths of the ocean, leaving all vehicles to the whim of the waves
061.text: Reserve all vehicle cards (if any) while you're underwater. You are enveloped by water. As your eyes adjust, you find yourself in an aquatic world. Go to either 650[/b] or 656[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

610.text: The animal grunts, swerving to the left so as to not bother with you. Gain 1 morale.

611.text: You slip and slide over the ice, catching yourself on the surrounding stone. It’s on one of the rock faces that you notice the rune representing take[/b]. Gain 1 boost and continue.

612.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with a circuit board in hand
612.text: You run as fast as one can through snow with a circuit board in hand. Gain item 1190[/b].

613.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the device
613.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

614.text: You kneel before the massive creature. They nudge you to rise and reveal that they saw you crash on this planet, and they’re pleased that you emerged from your escape pod much more quickly than the Traveler did. They mention that some of your wreckage is to the southwest of here. Gain 2 boost.

615.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the Traveler about escaping this planet
615.text: The Traveler’s tone grows cautious. “If you aren’t worried about the risks involved, you could share the specifics of wireless technology with circuit sentients.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1606[/b] (place it in the center).

616.text: You tap into the enormous power emanating from the elemental, summoning aid from your crewmates. Their visages are projected across the planet to your location.
