Each player who has a circuit composition card (in their grid or reserve) or pays 2 boost is considered summoned. If this is a solo game, you may select one unused starting character card (1435[/b]–1440[/b]) to act as a summoned player. Summoned players may temporarily place challenge dice in their grid as if they were on your location, but only you suffer penalties from the elemental. Summoned players remain summoned until you perform any action other than overpower-SLAY[/b][/b]. Continue.

617.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the circuit board
617.text: Pressing the button prompts you to plug your augsuit into the tall circuit board. Suddenly you’re flooded with information about cities of the world. Gain item 1193[/b].

618.text: As you step forward, an alarm sounds once—a warning. You are to stand still during this conversation. Gain 1 engage[/b] and continue.

619.text: The sentient doesn’t look up from their work, but after a few moments they explain in a pedantic tone that they’re repairing one of the many cables that allow their fellow circuit sentients to remain constantly connected to each other. Gain 1 boost; you may continue.

062.action: [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] into the depths of the ocean, leaving all vehicles to the whim of the waves
062.text: Reserve all vehicle cards (if any) while you're underwater. You are enveloped by water. As your eyes adjust, you find yourself in an aquatic world. Go to either 634[/b] or 640[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

620.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the arched rock onto the box
620.text: The rock, brittle from the cold, easily snaps off and crushes the box. The sentient wiggles free from its bonds, thanking you profusely. Gain sentient 1326[/b].

621.text: Your spirited performance delights the judges, and they welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the look-MEMORIZE[/b][/b] action.

622.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with the sentient’s helmet in your hands
622.text: The intimidating sentient is caught entirely by surprise, and without their helmet they are helpless as you scamper away. Gain item 1024[/b] and go to an adjacent listed location.

623.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the Traveler about escaping this planet
623.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, you might partner with the circuit sentients to the south. Beware of their ambitions, though.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1606[/b] (place it in the center).

624.text: Your skin sticks to the frozen cables as you scale the tower. From the top you can see the entire area from above. View page 32 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

625.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the cradle surrounding the crystal
625.text: Before the sentients in the area realize what you’re doing, you step into the cradle and touch the stone. You’re not quite sure what happens next—the best way you can describe it is the feeling of putting the last piece into a puzzle, and that piece is your soul. Gain lesson 1424[/b].

626.text: The scalding hot metal burns your forearm; suffer 1 heat damage. Go to interior 581[/b].

627.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] north across the icy cables
627.text: You figure there must be an easier way to enter the city, but you haven’t seen one yet. Choose one:

choices.option: Enter the city
choices.outcome: Go to city 521[/b], gain 1 random skill, and gain 1 morale.

choices.option: Balance north past the city
choices.outcome: Go to 493[/b] and gain 1 morale.

628.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with the pliers in hand
628.text: You grab the pliers and run away before their owner comes looking for them. Gain item 883[/b].

629.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the beast to the ground in front of you
629.text: The animal drifts onto the edge of the cliff, one of its tentacles draped off the edge. It moans softly as you walk around it. Gain either 1 help[/b] or 1 take[/b]; you may continue.

063.action: [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] into the depths of the ocean, leaving all vehicles to the whim of the waves
063.text: Reserve all vehicle cards (if any) while you're underwater. You are enveloped by water. As your eyes adjust, you find yourself in an aquatic world. Go to either 633[/b] or 639[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

630.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] up to the levitating vehicle and drag yourself aboard
630.text: The vehicle is unmanned, so you find yourself at the helm. Gain vehicle 1010[/b].

631.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
631.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (053[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (052[/b]); overpower[/b] (051[/b]).

632.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
632.text: As you near the surface, the ocean here looks pleasantly calm. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (063[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (061[/b]); overpower[/b] (052[/b]).

633.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
633.text: You swim parallel to the long seaweed up toward the uncertain surface above. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (063[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (052[/b]); overpower[/b] (053[/b]).

634.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
634.text: The bioluminescence of the rift below illuminates your swim all the way up to the ocean surface. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (059[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (053[/b]); overpower[/b] (054[/b]).

635.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
635.text: As you near the ocean’s top, you notice some turbulence on the water. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (056[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (058[/b]); overpower[/b] (055[/b]).

636.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
636.text: After looking at the waterspouts again, you decide it’s prudent to surface. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (060[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (062[/b]); overpower[/b] (056[/b]).

637.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
637.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (058[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (054[/b]); overpower[/b] (057[/b]).

638.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
638.text: You’re grateful to be above water again, but the ocean is a harsh mistress. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (055[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (059[/b]); overpower[/b] (058[/b]).

639.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
639.text: Being back above water is a welcome relief. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (051[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (060[/b]); overpower[/b] (059[/b]).

064.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] to a ground location below
064.text: You hover among the clouds. Choose one:

choices.option: Fly down to the center of a quadrant within this region
choices.outcome: Land in the northwest (241[/b]), northeast (244[/b]), southeast (229[/b]), or southwest (226[/b]). Gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Return to your ground location (only if your previous action resulted in arriving at this sky location)
choices.outcome: Go to the location from which you just took off and gain 1 boost.

640.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
640.text: You swim to the ocean surface above. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (056[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (051[/b]); overpower[/b] (060[/b]).

641.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
641.text: You swim up toward the surface, which from here looks pleasant. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (054[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (059[/b]); overpower[/b] (062[/b]).

641.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the city through the primary gates
641.text: Guards bristle at you at the entrance before letting you pass. Go to city 528[/b] and gain 1 random skill.

642.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
642.text: As you swim toward the ocean surface, the behemoth’s long, glowing tendrils ripple with curiosity. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (062[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (056[/b]); overpower[/b] (061[/b]).

643.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
643.text: You emerge on a small, rocky archipelago. Go to 512[/b].

643.action: [b][MOVE] RIDE[/b] the animal north around the waterspout
643.text: The animal glances back at you, shrugs, and drags you north around the water spout. Go to 644[/b].

644.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
644.text: You swim to the surface, but you’re still at the mercy of the waves. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (058[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (057[/b]); overpower[/b] (514[/b]).

644.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] into the ship through a small hole in the side
644.text: The inside of the wreckage is in shambles, and you barely have enough room to turn around and move back outside. The good news is that the locker containing your power armor is still intact. The bad news is that you’ll need to cleave the wreckage in half to get to it. Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

645.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
645.text: You’re in the middle of the ocean, but at least the middle of the ocean is pleasant at the moment. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (061[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (060[/b]); overpower[/b] (063[/b]).

646.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
646.text: You’re happy to feel the air again, but you’re in the middle of the vast ocean. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (060[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (057[/b]); overpower[/b] (051[/b]).

647.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
647.text: It looks to be pleasant enough on the surface here. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (059[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (054[/b]); overpower[/b] (052[/b]).
Your spirited performance delights the judges, and they welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the overpower-FIGHT[/b][/b] action.

648.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
648.text: As you swim back to the surface, you stay close to the towering stems and cautiously far from the roving sharks. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (062[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (056[/b]); overpower[/b] (053[/b]).

649.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
649.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (058[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (056[/b]); overpower[/b] (054[/b]).

649.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] into the ship through a small hole in the side
649.text: You pull yourself into the hull. Go to interior 012[/b].

065.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] to a ground location below
065.text: You hover among the clouds. Choose one:

choices.option: Fly down to the center of a quadrant within this region
choices.outcome: Land in the northwest (627[/b]), northeast (630[/b]), southeast (615[/b]), or southwest (612[/b]). Gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Return to your ground location (only if your previous action resulted in arriving at this sky location)
choices.outcome: Go to the location from which you just took off and gain 1 boost.

650.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
650.text: You’re back above the water but still far from any shore. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (061[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (062[/b]); overpower[/b] (055[/b]).

651.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
651.text: You swim upward and see thrashing on the surface above. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (057[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (063[/b]); overpower[/b] (056[/b]).

652.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] directly above you to catch your breath and avoid the animals
652.text: You can breathe normally again but are no less at the mercy of the currents. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (060[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (052[/b]); overpower[/b] (057[/b]).

653.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to get a better view of the surrounding area
653.text: Except for the forests far to the east, the waves stretch to the horizon in every direction. View page 46 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost. Then Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (054[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (063[/b]); overpower[/b] (058[/b]).

654.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
654.text: You swim upward among the gangly, billowing creatures, careful not to touch them. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (057[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (053[/b]); overpower[/b] (059[/b]).

655.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
655.text: You follow the trail of luminescent bubbles all the way to the surface above. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (055[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (051[/b]); overpower[/b] (060[/b]).

656.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
656.text: You follow the glowing bubbles to the surface above. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (052[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (055[/b]); overpower[/b] (061[/b]).

You’re increasingly overwhelmed by claustrophobia as you move deeper and deeper inside. You can feel the pressure increase as you swim deeper and deeper underwater, the darkness closing in on you. Lose 1 morale and go to cave 032[/b].

657.text: You tap into the enormous power emanating from the elemental, summoning aid from your crewmates. Their visages are projected across the planet to your location. Each player who has a water composition card (in their grid or reserve) or pays 2 boost is considered summoned. If this is a solo game, you may select one unused starting character card (1435[/b]–1440[/b]) to act as a summoned player. Summoned players may temporarily place challenge dice in their grid as if they were on your location, but only you suffer penalties from the elemental. Summoned players remain summoned until you perform any action other than overpower-SLAY[/b][/b]. Continue.

658.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
658.text: You follow the bright red cord far to the surface above. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (053[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (057[/b]); overpower[/b] (063[/b]).

659.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
659.text: You leave the glowing graveyard behind and swim to the surface far above. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (052[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (061[/b]); overpower[/b] (062[/b]).

066.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] to a ground location below
066.text: You hover among the clouds. Choose one:

choices.option: Fly down to the center of a quadrant within this region
choices.outcome: Land in the northwest (271[/b]), northeast (274[/b]), southeast (259[/b]), or southwest (256[/b]). Gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Return to your ground location (only if your previous action resulted in arriving at this sky location)
choices.outcome: Go to the location from which you just took off and gain 1 boost.

660.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
660.text: You follow the streams of bubbles up toward the ocean surface. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (051[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (055[/b]); overpower[/b] (059[/b]).
The cheerful animal guides you through the poisonous anemones to the west, swaying with the current. You exit the other side to 648[/b], where the animal darts away.

661.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north over the rushing water
661.text: You pass by the vehicle on your way north. Choose one:

choices.option: Hijack the vehicle (if available; pay 1 take)
choices.outcome: You take the opportunity to grab the reins and steer it as you wish. Gain vehicle 1013[/b] with 1 boost on it, then go to 666[/b].

choices.option: Ignore the vehicle (or if it is not available)
choices.outcome: Go to 666[/b].

662.text: Three muscular sentients look up from a pile of bones, surprised by the intrusion. Choose one:

choices.option: Slowly back away
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Assist the sentients with their task
choices.outcome: Continue with the help-ASSIST[/b][/b] action.

choices.option: Challenge the sentients to a tabletop game
choices.outcome: Continue with the overpower-DUEL[/b][/b] action.

choices.option: Subdue the sentients
choices.outcome: Using the element of surprise, continue with an overpower--SUBDUE[/b][/b] action, then go to interior 584[/b] and gain 1 random skill.

663.text: While you stroll around the knoll, you find several large lotuses growing near the rune. Choose one:

choices.option: Smell it
choices.outcome: Gain 1 health and 1 boost; you may also lose 1 curse.

choices.option: Brew it
choices.outcome: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b].

choices.option: Pluck it
choices.outcome: Gain flora 1159[/b].

664.text: With confidence that everything will be okay, you step into the gateway. Go to cave 083[/b].

665.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the Traveler about escaping this planet
665.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “Instead of leaving, there are several idyllic, unoccupied houses here where you could settle down.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1600[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

666.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the button on the device
666.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

667.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the ceremony (if you already interacted with the ceremony, reduce this cost to 1)
667.text: You quietly observe the ceremony as you head north. Gain 1 boost and go to 672[/b].

668.action: [b][MOVE] CHASE[/b] away the animal (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
668.text: If the animal is still an obstacle, you make yourself big, spooking the animal (gain 1 morale). You may go north to 673[/b].

669.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with a mushroom in hand
669.text: You make quick work of the task in case anyone is watching. Gain item 1136[/b].

067.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] to a ground location below
067.text: You hover among the clouds. Choose one:

choices.option: Fly down to the center of a quadrant within this region
choices.outcome: Land in the northwest (341[/b]), northeast (344[/b]), southeast (329[/b]), or southwest (326[/b]). Gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Return to your ground location (only if your previous action resulted in arriving at this sky location)
choices.outcome: Go to the location from which you just took off and gain 1 boost.

670.text: While you stroll around the knoll, you find several large lotuses growing near the rune. Choose one:

choices.option: Smell it
choices.outcome: Gain 1 health and 1 boost; you may also lose 1 curse.

choices.option: Brew it
choices.outcome: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b].

choices.option: Pluck it
choices.outcome: Gain flora 1159[/b].

671.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the embassy after a short walk north
671.text: Your feet sink into the moss, hiding your approach from anyone who may be inside the building. Go to interior 585[/b].

672.text: Seeing you approach, the sentient waves you over. They seem eager to teach you how to fish, though they’re difficult to understand, so it might be easier to trade with them. Gain either 1 look[/b] or 1 engage[/b]; you may continue.

673.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] past the distracted sentient into the building (if you already interacted with the sentient, add 1 to the cost of this action)
673.text: You could knock on the door, but you’re confident no one is inside the building. Go to interior 560[/b].

674.text: The long-limbed animal pays you no heed as it goes about its job of gathering fruit. It winds west, then north, then west again, eventually arriving at a village. You follow it inside, where it disappears in the crowd. Go to city 519[/b].

675.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with the unopened chest
675.text: Worried that the owner of the chest is nearby, you scamper away with the chest under your arm. Gain item 1034[/b].

676.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the building, avoiding the sentient
676.text: Unless you already consoled the sentient, they cry even louder as you walk past them (lose 1 morale). Go to interior 585[/b].

677.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the city through a narrow entrance
677.text: For such a vast city, the gateways are quite small. Go to city 519[/b].

678.text: The grass tickles your skin, and you pull a leafy tendril from the soil. Gain flora 1060[/b].

679.text: The intimidating animal doesn’t move as you enter the orb. Inside you see a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 6 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is SW-4. Gain 1 boost.

068.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] to a ground location below
068.text: You hover among the clouds. Choose one:

choices.option: Fly down to the center of a quadrant within this region
choices.outcome: Land in the northwest (186[/b]), northeast (189[/b]), southeast (349[/b]), or southwest (346[/b]). Gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Return to your ground location (only if your previous action resulted in arriving at this sky location)
choices.outcome: Go to the location from which you just took off and gain 1 boost.

680.text: The creature seems content to guide you through the forest. Go northeast to 384[/b]. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all engage[/b] results. If you pay 1 engage[/b], gain animal 854[/b]. Otherwise the animal prances away.

681.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] under the web without touching it
681.text: As you emerge from the web, you look back to see a massive eight-legged beast hanging over the unwebbed path, eagerly awaiting an unsuspecting victim. Gain 1 morale and go north to 686[/b].

682.text: You walk up to the front door of the house, where a wood sentient warmly welcomes you inside. They share that they are struggling to solve a difficult problem involving the Tools of Creation. Choose one:Go to interior 586[/b] and continue with the look-SOLVE[/b][/b] action.Go to interior 586[/b] and continue with the engage-PERSUADE[/b][/b] action to try to buy the house.Grab the closest item to the entrance (gain item 995[/b]) and dash west to 681[/b].

683.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the sentient by awkwardly swinging from vine to vine
683.text: The sentient barely disguises their amusement as they compliment your vine-swinging abilities. They offer to teach you something more useful. Gain lesson 1420[/b].

684.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north up the stairs around the winged animals
684.text: Roll 4 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay 1 look (or if you have already dealt with the threat of the beetle)
choices.outcome: Go to 689[/b].

choices.option: Do not pay 1 look
choices.outcome: You fail to notice the hidden beetle on the left-side tree, waiting patiently for unsuspecting prey; you feel a sharp sting and tumble off the staircase (lose 1 health and go east to 685[/b]).

685.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the button on the device
685.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

686.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] to the top of the tree
686.text: You can see far around you from this vantage. View page 43 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost; you may continue.

687.text: The endless forest requires you to climb even higher for a clear vantage. View page 43 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

688.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to view the surrounding area from above the canopy
688.text: The tower is easy to reach from your position and even easier to scale. View page 43 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

689.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] even higher up the canopy to get your cats
689.text: The feisty felines lash out in fear. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all help[/b] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay 1 help[/b]. Gain animal 827[/b].

069.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] to a ground location below
069.text: You hover among the clouds. Choose one:

choices.option: Fly down to the center of a quadrant within this region
choices.outcome: Land in the northwest (221[/b]), northeast (224[/b]), southeast (209[/b]), or southwest (206[/b]). Gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Return to your ground location (only if your previous action resulted in arriving at this sky location)
choices.outcome: Go to the location from which you just took off and gain 1 boost.

690.text: You step into one of the arched gateways… and right out the other side into the grass. If these gateways were once special, now they’re just stone arches. Gain 1 engage[/b] and 1 help[/b]; you may continue.

691.text: The tangle is far denser than you first thought. At one point your foot catches between two twisted branches and you can’t break free. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all help[/b] results. Lose 1 morale unless you pay 1 help[/b] to steady your heart rate. Finally you’re able to relax, collect yourself, and proceed to the center of the tower, where you find a beautiful glowing shard. Gain item 1225[/b].

692.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the animal to join you
692.text: The animal was already approaching you, and there’s a slight spring in their step when they see your eagerness to greet them. You scratch behind their ears, and they are happy. Gain animal 841[/b].

693.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the alpha tree (only if you have been welcomed as a participant in this trial; otherwise choose another action)
693.text: Find card 536[/b] (it’s a large card), place it on the table, and begin. You must chart a course (using cubes) to form a single connected path across the trunk of the alpha tree, starting and ending at the same knot. You will travel between knots in vertical or horizontal line segments (not diagonal). You may only travel between knots one time, never doubling back; you may not use all knots. The most venerated wood sentients live in this tree, each with a number carved on their door. To respect their wishes, your course must include the exact number of desired line segments around each door. See entry 693[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

694.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the ruins, gingerly avoiding rubble and debris
694.text: Nature overgrew these ruins long ago, but nonetheless some interesting items remain unlooted. Go to interior 546[/b].

695.text: The barn is empty except for a few saddles. Gain item 958[/b].

696.text: Even with an entire field to discover, you keep drifting back to the lotus. Choose one:

choices.option: Smell it
choices.outcome: Gain 1 health and 1 boost; you may also lose 1 curse.

choices.option: Brew it
choices.outcome: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item 867[/b].

choices.option: Pluck it
choices.outcome: Gain flora 1159[/b].

697.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] into the ship through a small hole in the side
697.text: The inside of the wreckage is in shambles, and you barely have enough room to turn around and move back outside. The good news is that the locker containing your power armor is still intact. The bad news is that you’ll need to cleave the wreckage in half to get to it. Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

698.text: You’re increasingly overwhelmed by claustrophobia as you move deeper and deeper inside. You’re walking on an old tree branch, and you worry it may break at any moment, sending you falling into a misty void. Just when you can’t take it any longer, a cavern opens before you. Lose 1 morale and go to cave 038[/b].

699.text: You give a celebratory high five to the levitating device. Gain 2 help[/b] and go to 779[/b].

070.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] to a ground location below
070.text: You hover among the clouds. Choose one:

choices.option: Fly down to the center of a quadrant within this region
choices.outcome: Land in the northwest (166[/b]), northeast (169[/b]), southeast (154[/b]), or southwest (151[/b]). Gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Return to your ground location (only if your previous action resulted in arriving at this sky location)
choices.outcome: Go to the location from which you just took off and gain 1 boost.

700.action: [b][MOVE] FOLLOW[/b] the path north across the rolling hills toward a sprawling city
700.text: The path leads to the outskirts of a city. Go to 785[/b].

701.text: As you enter the box, you feel all of your possessions peel away from you. If you have any sentients, animals, flora, items, or vehicles, they remain on this location (set them aside on location 701[/b]; refresh any challenge dice on them and keep any boost on them. You will regain them automatically if you return here in the future). When you step out of the box, you’re on a different location, unarmed and vulnerable to the haunting elemental looming over you. Go to 369[/b]; ignore the “upon arrival” instructions and read entry 369[/b] in the Book of Secrets.

702.text: The animal seems quite protective of the lotus, making it difficult to chase away but ultimately easy to catch. Gain animal 838[/b]; you may continue.

703.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the slow sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
703.text: You spin around a rocky column before darting north. Go to 704[/b].

704.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] your choice of the orb or the cave

choices.option: Enter the orb
choices.outcome: The orb is a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 6 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is SW-2. Gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Enter the cave
choices.outcome: As you wander down past the cave entrance, waves of energy from deeper inside disorient you. Go to cave 050[/b].

705.text: The animal crouches low to the ground as you approach, like a playful puppy. It then swerves to the north, skittering down the hill, occasionally checking to make sure you’re following. When you reach the cloud cover, it gallops away. Go to 706[/b].

706.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the animal to land near you
706.text: You wave frantically at the animal, steering it to a soft patch of grass. It lands with a thud, throwing you backwards, but you can tell it meant no harm. In fact, it seems grateful that you provided safe harbor, as its pursuers are nowhere to be found. Gain animal 840[/b].

707.text: You’re filled with a sense of peace as you stroll around the area. Gain 1 morale. The peace is broken by the frantic cries of a sentient to the north.

708.action: [b][MOVE] HIDE[/b] before the sentient spots you
708.text: You throw yourself out of the path of the sentient. In their haste, they rush right past you. As you lay in the soft loam, you decide how to proceed:Go north to 709[/b].Take a running leap to go east to 714[/b] (unless you pay 1 move[/b], lose 1 health).Go south to 707[/b].Go west to 702[/b].

709.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the rope (add 2 to the cost if the rope is no longer there)
709.text: The rope leads into a massive vein of blue crystals. A young sentient is trapped within. If you pay 1 help[/b], you free the sentient (gain sentient 1346[/b]); otherwise gain 2 help[/b] and continue.

071.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] to a ground location below
071.text: You hover among the clouds. Choose one:

choices.option: Fly down to the center of a quadrant within this region
choices.outcome: Land in the northwest (286[/b]), northeast (289[/b]), southeast (490[/b]), or southwest (487[/b]). Gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Return to your ground location (only if your previous action resulted in arriving at this sky location)
choices.outcome: Go to the location from which you just took off and gain 1 boost.

710.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the steep cliff
710.text: After you cross the stream feeding the waterfall, you slowly climb down the nearly sheer cliff face to a rocky plain below. Go to 711[/b] and gain 1 morale.

711.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the ruins or [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] around the ruins to the north

choices.option: ENTER
choices.outcome: Lose 1 health unless the animal is no longer an obstacle, then go to interior 547[/b].

choices.option: HIKE
choices.outcome: Lose 1 health unless the animal is no longer an obstacle, then go north to 712[/b].

712.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on the device
712.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

713.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] into the ship through a small hole in the side
713.text: The inside of the wreckage is in shambles, and you barely have enough room to turn around and move back outside. The good news is that the locker containing your power armor is still intact. The bad news is that you’ll need to cleave the wreckage in half to get to it. Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

714.text: The sentient pauses to explain that they are sending messages to the north, where their sibling was captured by northern metal sentients. Gain 1 look[/b] and quest 1652[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

715.text: The Soulkeeper admires your courage. With a click of their rocky appendages, they select a soulstone for you. Roll a skill die and gain a crystal matching the resulting color (blue[/b]: 1160[/b]; purple[/b]: 1161[/b]; orange[/b]: 1162[/b]; green[/b]: 1163[/b]; yellow[/b]: 1164[/b]; red[/b]: 1165[/b]).

716.text: You’re increasingly overwhelmed by claustrophobia as you move deeper and deeper inside. Just when you can’t take it any longer, a cavern opens before you. Lose 1 morale and go to cave 024[/b].

717.text: As you slice through the warm water, you see a golden glimmer in the depths. Choose one:

choices.option: Return to the surface
choices.outcome: Gain 1 morale.

choices.option: Follow the glimmer
choices.outcome: The water drains into an increasingly narrow passage, ending in a trickle along the walls of a cavern. Go to cave 084[/b].

718.text: By the time the slow sentient reaches your area, you’ve concealed yourself safely behind a boulder. They bound away; go to an adjacent listed location.

719.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] up the pillar of rock to view your surroundings
719.text: The crisscrossing gorges and the impossible rocky towers here look even stranger from above. View page 40 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

072.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] to a ground location below
072.text: You hover among the clouds. Choose one:

choices.option: Fly down to the center of a quadrant within this region
choices.outcome: Land in the northwest (770[/b]), northeast (788[/b]), southeast (700[/b]), or southwest (697[/b]). Gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Return to your ground location (only if your previous action resulted in arriving at this sky location)
choices.outcome: Go to the location from which you just took off and gain 1 boost.

720.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the button on the device
720.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune.

721.text: Your spirited performance delights the judges, and they welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the look-CALCULATE[/b][/b] action.

722.text: Clearing this particular gap ignites in you an unexpectedly strong sense of satisfaction. Go to 723[/b] and gain 1 morale.

723.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tower to get a better view of the surrounding area
723.text: The peculiarly low gravity of this part of the world has wrought a fantastical (but dangerous) landscape. View page 40 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

724.action: [b][MOVE] CHASE[/b] the glowing beast away from the treasure chest
724.text: The beast is not easily intimidated, but they finally skitter into the shadows, leaving the chest for you to open. Continue with the engage-PICK[/b][/b] action at a cost reduced by 2.

725.text: You can’t read the sign, but you find a footpath leading from the dot on the nearby tuft of earth over to the line to the left. It then leads north. Gain 1 morale, then choose one:Continue on this location.

choices.option: Go north
choices.outcome: You catch up with a sentient heading the same way. Before you outpace them, you learn that you’re on the Pilgrim’s Path. Gain quest 1673[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply) and go to 726[/b].

726.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the pair of sentients away from the aggressor (if the massive creature is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
726.text: The sentients give you a small token of their appreciation (gain item 876[/b]) before scampering away. Go north to 727[/b], east to 410[/b], south to 725[/b], or west to 720[/b].

727.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the city through the primary entrance
727.text: You’re worried that one haphazard step on the path into the city will send you sprawling into the misty depths, but some unseen force pulls you into the front gate. Go to city 523[/b].

728.text: The sentient grins as they grab your hand and leap; you’re surprised to find that the lower gravity in the area results in you drifting comfortably to the ground. “Now for the real thing!” the sentient exclaims. You may gain sentient 1347[/b] and go west to 722[/b].

729.text: You tap into the enormous power emanating from the elemental, summoning aid from your crewmates. Their visages are projected across the planet to your location. Each player who has a stone composition card (in their grid or reserve) or pays 2 boost is considered summoned. If this is a solo game, you may select one unused starting character card (1435[/b]–1440[/b]) to act as a summoned player. Summoned players may temporarily place challenge dice in their grid as if they were on your location, but only you suffer penalties from the elemental. Summoned players remain summoned until you perform any action other than overpower-SLAY[/b][/b]. Continue.

073.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] to a ground location below
073.text: You hover among the clouds. Choose one:

choices.option: Fly down to the center of a quadrant within this region
choices.outcome: Land in the northwest (711[/b]), northeast (729[/b]), southeast (725[/b]), or southwest (707[/b]). Gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Return to your ground location (only if your previous action resulted in arriving at this sky location)
choices.outcome: Go to the location from which you just took off and gain 1 boost.

730.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] past the guards into the cave
730.text: Taking full advantage of the dim lighting, you manage to avoid drawing the guards’ attention. Go to cave 020[/b].

731.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] into the ship through a small hole in the side
731.text: The inside of the wreckage is in shambles, and you barely have enough room to turn around and move back outside. The good news is that the locker containing your power armor is still intact. The bad news is that you’ll need to cleave the wreckage in half to get to it. Gain 1 boost and 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

732.text: You gingerly avoid rubble and debris as you enter the wreckage. Go to interior 791[/b].

733.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] up the towering boulder to reach the Pearl
733.text: A sentient is walking down a much easier-to-use staircase on the back of the boulder when you arrive, and they encourage you to touch the Pearl. When you do, your mind goes blank, save for three glowing symbols. Choose one and gain the corresponding spell: life (gain spell 1236[/b]), spirit (gain spell 1237[/b]), or mind (gain spell 1238[/b]).

734.text: At the edge of the bridge, you attempt to climb into the rift, but the energy radiating out of it is too strong for you to push through. Choose one:

choices.option: Soak in the energy of the rift
choices.outcome: Gain lesson 1433[/b].

choices.option: Grab something from the watery side of the rift
choices.outcome: Gain flora 1061[/b].

735.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the sentient without startling them
735.text: You step out into the heat to ensure the sentient sees you before you tap on the glass (suffer 1 heat damage). Seeing your skin wilt in the sun, the sentient ushers you inside the protective dome, where they tell you that they’re working on a new type of orb that just isn’t working the way they hoped. Instead of displaying your location on a map, they’re trying to create an orb that lets you talk face to face with anyone inside any other orb. They give you a pair of goggles linked to their own to give you an idea of what they’re trying to do (gain item 941[/b]).

736.text: Despite your careful steps, several wedges of glass slice your skin. Lose 1 health and go to 486[/b].

737.text: The resident tries to warn you, but you don’t listen. Inside you find blood-soaked floorboards. Go to interior 588[/b].

738.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the city through the primary gates
738.text: The residents of the city seem very friendly to travelers. Go to city 527[/b].

739.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] close to the island, remaining hidden in the water
739.text: Just in case there are guards among the brush, you hold your breath as long as possible before emerging close to shore. Suspended from a rusty chain you find a large mech suit, presumably stolen. Gain vehicle 984[/b].

074.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] to a ground location below
074.text: You hover among the clouds. Choose one:

choices.option: Fly down to the center of a quadrant within this region
choices.outcome: Land in the northwest (116[/b]), northeast (119[/b]), southeast (475[/b]), or southwest (472[/b]). Gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Return to your ground location (only if your previous action resulted in arriving at this sky location)
choices.outcome: Go to the location from which you just took off and gain 1 boost.

740.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the Traveler about escaping this planet
740.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “Leave? You are on the cusp of one of the greatest mysteries— time travel is within your grasp!” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1608[/b] (place it in the center).

741.text: Your skin tingles as you cross an invisible barrier. Suddenly the clear blue sky is replaced by an orange haze. Go to 515[/b].

742.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the Traveler about escaping this planet
742.text: Their tone grows contemplative. “If you must leave, you could find the Aegis and master the art of time travel.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1608[/b] (place it in the center).

743.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] into the mouth of the cave, ignoring the sentients
743.text: As your eyes adjust to the darkness, you reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave 031[/b].

744.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the tallest point on the island
744.text: Clouds cover most of the ocean as far as you can see, but there are some interesting sights from this vantage nonetheless. View page 42 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

744.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] around the island to an unoccupied hut
744.text: With most sentients gathered on the shore, their attention to the east, you easily sneak around them to a ramshackle hut. Go to interior 587[/b].

745.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] the boat into the current
745.text: You feel at home at the helm of this fine vessel. Gain vehicle 1156[/b] and choose one:

choices.option: Steer east or south
choices.outcome: Go either east (751[/b]) or south (744[/b]) and gain curse 1386[/b].

choices.option: Steer north or west
choices.outcome: Go either north (746[/b]) or west (739[/b]) and gain 1 random skill.

746.text: The owners of the vacation home aren’t there, but the space is almost empty anyway. If you pay 1 look[/b], gain item 1018[/b]. Otherwise, gain item 955[/b].

747.text: You chase away the animal, but in the process you slice your forearm on the glass-like foliage on the left. Lose 1 health. In anger, you tear the flora from the sand. Gain flora 1046[/b]; you may go north to 748[/b].

748.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the city through the primary gates
748.text: Dash past security to city 531[/b] and gain 1 morale.

749.action: [b][MOVE] WANDER[/b] around the area looking for resources
749.text: The lush island around the lotus is bursting with natural resources. Gain your choice of wood (1180[/b]), leaves (1181[/b]), water (1183[/b]), or sand (1194[/b]).

075.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] to a ground location below
075.text: You hover among the clouds. Choose one:

choices.option: Fly down to the center of a quadrant within this region
choices.outcome: Land in the northwest (740[/b]), northeast (758[/b]), southeast (480[/b]), or southwest (477[/b]). Gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Return to your ground location (only if your previous action resulted in arriving at this sky location)
choices.outcome: Go to the location from which you just took off and gain 1 boost.

750.action: [b][MOVE] DODGE[/b] the kraken (if the kraken is no longer an obstacle, choose a different action)
750.text: You dart this way and that until the kraken is tied up in knots. It sinks into the sea, where the tides may untangle it. The villagers reward you; gain item 899[/b], 1 morale, and 1 move[/b].

751.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the child in such a way that you don’t startle or scare them
751.text: You splash in the water as you approach the shore, but you keep some distance between you and the child, giving them a chance to size you up. Seeing that you mean no harm, the sentient says that they’re going on a grand quest before dinnertime, and they could protect you if you decide to join their adventuring party. Gain 1 move[/b] and quest 1643[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

752.text: You tap into the enormous power emanating from the elemental, summoning aid from your crewmates. Their visages are projected across the planet to your location. Each player who has a sand composition card (in their grid or reserve) or pays 2 boost is considered summoned. If this is a solo game, you may select one unused starting character card (1435[/b]–1440[/b]) to act as a summoned player. Summoned players may temporarily place challenge dice in their grid as if they were on your location, but only you suffer penalties from the elemental. Summoned players remain summoned until you perform any action other than overpower-SLAY[/b][/b]. Continue.

753.text: The members of the caravan don’t seem to mind you bringing up the rear; “bandit bait,” one of them mutters. Go to 754[/b].

754.action: [b][MOVE] SPEED[/b] through the racetrack (only if you have been welcomed as a participant in this trial; otherwise choose another action)
754.text: The Trial of Speed will soon begin. Gain card 540[/b] (it’s a large card), place it on the table with 1 token of each corresponding color on the starting spaces, and begin. Each token represents a different racer; yours is the token that matches your character color. Roll 6 skill dice and proceed to move the matching tokens forward (orthogonally or diagonally) in any order, completing the movement for each color (if possible) before moving another token. Only one token can be on a space at any time. When you’ve used all 6 dice, roll them and repeat the process until a token crosses the finish line. The goal is to have your token win the race. See entry 754[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

755.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the sentient away from the wreckage
755.text: The sentient doesn’t resist as you lead them away from the wreckage. They give you a hug and thank you for helping them break out of a cycle of self-destruction. Gain 1 morale and 1 move[/b].

756.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] north over the slippery rocks
756.text: As you climb, you reach another treasure chest tucked into the cliff. It easily opens. Gain item 1252[/b], then go to 757[/b].

757.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] behind one waterfall after another, the water stinging your eyes
757.text: Behind the third waterfall you find the entrance to a cave. Lose 1 health and go to cave 023[/b].

758.action: [b][MOVE] HIDE[/b] from the beast under the skeleton
758.text: The sand centipede sniffs around the edge of the grove before disappearing into the sand dunes. Choose one:

choices.option: Move north
choices.outcome: Go to 759[/b].

choices.option: Move east or west
choices.outcome: Go east to 458[/b] or west to 752[/b].

choices.option: Pay 1, 2, or 3 boost to dig into the soft soil under the skeleton
choices.outcome: If you paid 1 boost, gain 1 morale. If you paid 2 boost, gain item 1163[/b] and 1 morale. If you paid 3 boost, gain item 1163[/b] and 1 morale, and go to cave 083[/b].

759.text: The sentient is startled by your approach, and they drop their staff and dart away. With their student gone, the instructor offers you a choice: Gain the staff (934[/b]), their pupil (sentient 1343[/b]), or a taste of magic (lesson 1433[/b]).

076.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] one of the tree-like columns
076.text: From the top of the column, you can hear voices from above, and you contort your body to fit into the circular chimney. Go to interior 077[/b].

760.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the building through a sewage drain along the cliff
760.text: The stench is terrible, but at least no one else dares to use this passage. Go to interior 561[/b].

761.text: Thanks to a rope, the wall is relatively easy to overcome. When you reach the top of the wall, you feel a tug on the rope—someone else is hoping to climb up. You can either take the rope for yourself and leave them stranded down below (gain item 903[/b] and lose 1 morale) or leave the rope for the sentient to climb slowly (gain 1 morale). Either way, go north to 762[/b].

762.action: [b][MOVE] FOLLOW[/b] either the path or the sentient

choices.option: Follow the sentient south
choices.outcome: Go to 761[/b] and gain sentient 1328[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

choices.option: Follow the path north
choices.outcome: The path leads into the capital city. Go to 763[/b].

choices.option: Follow the path east
choices.outcome: The path leads to the front gate of the capital city. Go to 768[/b].

763.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the building through the front door
763.text: If you have at least 1 item, go to interior 589[/b]. Otherwise, the guards turn you away for not having anything to offer the Founder; gain 1 boost and continue.

764.text: In their drunken revelry, the sentients don’t notice your awkward dance moves. Soon you find joy in the rhythm and flow of the party. Gain ability 1469[/b] and 1 morale; you may continue.

765.text: You find some craftable leaves amidst the bushes. Gain item 1181[/b] and continue.

766.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] and grab the dangling rope
766.text: You pull yourself into the basket with the help of the sentient. The Traveler introduces them as an old friend, a cartographer well-versed in steering this balloon. Gain sentient 1307[/b] and go north to 345[/b].

767.text: You amble along the road, seeing no reason to make entering the city any more difficult than it needs to be. Go north to 768[/b].

768.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the sentient into the city
768.text: As you guide them, the sentient chats with you about how they tried to climb these city walls in their youth in preparation for the Trial of Trees. They offer to accompany you to the alpha tree to the southeast if you decide to give it a try. Gain sentient 1360[/b] and go north to 769[/b].

769.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the building through the front door
769.text: A broad-shouldered bouncer halts you from proceeding unless you pay $1. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay the bouncer
choices.outcome: Either go inside the tavern to share a drink with the locals (gain 1 morale and 1 health) or go to the stables (interior 590[/b]).

choices.option: Don’t pay the bouncer
choices.outcome: The disgruntled bouncer points to the north and proceeds to rant about some wind sentients who didn’t pay for their birthday party. If you can find them, you can keep the fee they should have paid. Gain quest 1653[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

077.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the pipe to the right up toward the skylight
077.text: You try to be as quiet as possible to avoid detection, but the wind chimes give away your presence. The sentients pull you from the rafters and toss you into a pit below the ground level. Go to interior 799[/b].

770.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] the boat out of the harbor
770.text: You feel at home at the helm of this fine vessel. Unfortunately, it’s technically not your vessel, and the owner curses you from the shore. Gain vehicle 1156[/b] and curse 1390[/b].

771.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] aboard the ship as a stowaway
771.text: You fall asleep in the cabin, and when you wake up, the surly crew is depositing you on the sand to the west of the city. Gain 1 health and go to 459[/b].

772.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the sentient, putting the boat between you and them
772.text: While awkwardly treading water, you talk to the sentient about why they’re preventing the ship from passing. They explain that the contraband Spor has been entering the city at escalating rates, and they’re suspicious of landwalker ships like this one. With the ship’s captain assuring you that they’re not involved, you promise the sentient that you’ll track down the source. Gain 1 look[/b] and quest 1666[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

773.text: You manage to squeeze into the gate, but it’s even narrower than it first appeared. You’re stuck. You may either pay 1 overpower[/b] to dig forward (go north to 774[/b]) or wiggle your legs until someone pulls you back out (lose 1 morale, gain 1 random skill, and continue).

774.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the fiery sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
774.text: Sentients or no sentients, flames are everywhere in this district, and you barely manage to avoid catching fire as you head north. Go to 775[/b].

775.action: [b][MOVE] HIDE[/b] in the bushes until the sentient passes (reduce this cost to 1 if the sentient is no longer an obstacle)
775.text: You feel like a little kid again as you hide in the bushes. Go north to 776[/b].

776.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with the closest item in hand
776.text: You weave among the tents and lose the vendor in the crowd, but not before they spit a curse at you. Gain item 966[/b] and curse 1389[/b]; go north to 777[/b].

777.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] up the path while the sentry is on the other side of the building
777.text: The path leads to a majestic building. Choose one:

choices.option: Enter the building
choices.outcome: Go to interior 583[/b].

choices.option: Proceed north around the building
choices.outcome: Go to 778[/b].

778.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] high into the tree to find more fruit
778.text: You have a good chance at finding fresh fruit up here. Roll 3 skill dice up to 3 times. If the results include at least 1 help[/b], gain item 1224[/b] and 1 health. Otherwise lose 1 health from eating a rotten piece of fruit.

779.text: The ivy makes the wall quite easy to climb. Go to 780[/b].

078.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] the sentient off the edge
078.text: With a yelp, the sentient tumbles from the tower, leaving you alone at the top with nothing to do but admire the view. View page 35 of the Book of Vantages and gain 1 boost.

780.action: [b][MOVE] WANDER[/b] through the many tiers of the garden
780.text: As you stroll, you’re amused by the sprinkle of fresh water that dances from the aqueduct onto your brow. Something in the bushes also catches your eye. Gain 1 look[/b], 1 take[/b], or 1 overpower[/b]; you may continue.

781.text: As soon as you put yourself in between the sentients, their anger at each other refocuses on you. “How dare you interject?” one yells. The other sentient agrees, saying that this matter is none of your business. Both sentients walk away with each other, commiserating about “the nerve of some people.” Gain 1 boost.

782.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north around the sentients (if the sentients are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
782.text: You slip through the dense greenery to an open street to the north. Go to 783[/b].

783.text: Before the Traveler can speak, you choose the topic:

choices.option: Request an introduction to the sentient
choices.outcome: “This is my friend, the banker. They work in the building directly to the north. They’re having a hard day and needed a break.” Gain 1 help[/b] and continue.

choices.option: Beg for a way to escape this planet
choices.outcome: “Instead of leaving, why not earn your keep here and start a new life? There are ruins just north of here that could use some helping hands.” Gain 1 boost and destiny 1601[/b] (place it in the center).

784.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] across the narrow walkway to the ruins, gingerly avoiding rubble and debris
784.text: As you carefully balance along the catwalk, you’re puzzled that the denizens of the capital city would let buildings decay on this prime real estate. Go to interior 548[/b].

785.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the bridge toward the voices
785.text: As you pull yourself up to the bridge, several guards immediately spot you. Choose one:

choices.option: Gesture provocatively at the guards (perform an overpower--DEFEND action)
choices.outcome: The guards sense your intent as hostile and attack. Afterwards, gain item 891[/b] and enter the city (go northwest to 780[/b]).

choices.option: Bow deeply to the guards
choices.outcome: Sensing that you mean no harm, the guards request either $2 to enter the city (go northwest to 780[/b]) or your help in guarding the bridge from invasive vagrants (gain quest 1680[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply).

785.text: You pull yourself up to the entrance of the city, just behind a group of armed guards. You can either proceed into the city to the northwest (go to 780[/b]) or follow the guards north atop the wall surrounding the city (go to 786[/b]).

786.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] a cable leading to an open window
786.text: While you place hand over hand, you admire the view of gardens to the west and north, a narrow section of the moat to the east, and a bridge to the south. Go to interior 591[/b] and gain 1 morale.

787.text: The sentient moves through the streets at such speed that it’s difficult to keep pace, but fortunately they don’t go far. They disappear into an elaborate building. Gain 1 boost; you may go north to 788[/b].

788.text: Go to 789[/b], grabbing what you think is a piece of fruit as you go. Gain item 1021[/b].

789.text: You dash past and find yourself in a park that feels, for lack of a better word, magical. Go north to 790[/b].

079.action: [b][MOVE] DODGE[/b] boulders as you proceed down toward the central pillar
079.text: Inside the pillar is a narrow, dark staircase that leads you even deeper into the planet. Go to cave 046[/b] and gain 1 morale.

790.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] away with the book in hand
790.text: Before anyone notices, you tuck the book under your arm and scamper away. Gain item 1045[/b].

791.text: As you settle into the captain’s chair, you realize that the ship is very similar to yours… except more advanced, which makes no sense, because this ship has been here for centuries. In any case, it isn’t going anywhere in its current condition. Gain 1 boost and continue.

795.text: Avoiding the watchful eyes of the red-eyed sentient to the right, you stay close to the wall and reach up to unhook the amulet hanging there. Gain item 1157[/b] and exit to 281[/b].

799.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the sheer walls of the dome using a bone as leverage
799.text: The vertical walls are pocked with dents and holes—you’re not the first person to escape this way. Gain item 1186[/b] and 1 morale; go to interior 076[/b].

008.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] to a ground location below
008.text: You hover among the clouds. Choose one:

choices.option: Fly down to the center of a quadrant within this region
choices.outcome: Land in the northwest (682[/b]), northeast (685[/b]), southeast (670[/b]), or southwest (667[/b]). Gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Return to your ground location (only if your previous action resulted in arriving at this sky location)
choices.outcome: Go to the location from which you just took off and gain 1 boost.

080.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] around the sentient to the back of the cavern
080.text: You find a small pile of coins and a dead end that might lead deeper if you push through it. Gain $3 and 1 move[/b]; you may continue.

801.text: You carefully approach the glowing shard, bracing against the wind that blows across this sky island. It feels as if the shard is reaching out to you as much as you are reaching out to it. Gain item 1707[/b].

081.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] through the soft layer of glowing sediment in the back of the cavern
081.text: The soft soil gives way, and you collapse into another passage. Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon 015[/b]; keep this location for reference.

082.text: Confident on the ice, you break off a piece of the crystal as you glide past it. Gain item 1160[/b]. The frozen stream slopes downward, leading you deeper into the planet. Go to cave 047[/b].

083.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the gateway, bracing against the blaze of energy around it
083.text: The energy seems to resist you, but you manage to push into the gateway. There’s a blinding light, and, when your vision clears, you find yourself on the surface. Go to 106[/b].

084.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] across the rope to the left
084.text: Your nimble balancing act gives you confidence for more feats of agility in the future (gain ability 1501[/b]). The staircase leads you deeper into the planet to cave 048[/b].

085.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] through the throng toward a narrow exit
085.text: The crowd is fixated on the fight happening in a small arena, and no one notices you slip out of the rear of the cave. Gain 1 boost and advance deeper into the planet to dungeon 019[/b]; keep this location for reference.

086.text: If you aim your long leap at the crystal perfectly by paying 1 look[/b] or 1 boost, you land on top of it, breaking off a piece (gain item 1162[/b]). Either way, you follow the passage on the far side of the magma, barely avoiding increasingly large shards that protrude from the cave walls. Advance deeper into the planet to cave 049[/b].

087.text: Darting from one shadow to the next, the closest the guards ever come to seeing you is when you almost knock over a discarded pickaxe. Gain item 896[/b]. You find a narrow, unguarded passage that leads even deeper into the planet. Go to cave 049[/b].

088.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] through the cavern, grabbing a crystal as you run
088.text: Despite the serenity of the cave, you never know when someone is watching. As you pocket a crystal, your foot catches on a root and you tumble into the darkness. Gain item 1161[/b] and go deeper into the planet to dungeon 017[/b]; keep this location for reference.

089.text: The soil breaks away easily, revealing a deeper area to explore. Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon 018[/b]; keep this location for reference.

009.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] to a ground location below
009.text: You hover among the clouds. Choose one:

choices.option: Fly down to the center of a quadrant within this region
choices.outcome: Land in the northwest (311[/b]), northeast (314[/b]), southeast (374[/b]), or southwest (371[/b]). Gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Steer slightly down to the sky island
choices.outcome: Go to 801[/b].

choices.option: Return to your ground location (only if your previous action resulted in arriving at this sky location)
choices.outcome: Go to the location from which you just took off and gain 1 boost.

090.action: [b][MOVE] WANDER[/b] aimlessly through the vault’s many treasures
090.text: As you’re about to scoop up some nondescript golden coins, you see it: a glowing, ethereal key. Gain item 917[/b].

091.text: As you crouch in the shadows, the body of the serpent slowly passes by, taking much longer than you would like to disappear. Finally it’s gone—for now—and you can use the opportunity to try to see what’s in the treasure chest. Gain either 2 engage[/b] or 2 take[/b]; continue.

092.action: [b][MOVE] SURFACE[/b] to catch your breath, emerging at the whim of the ocean currents
092.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: move[/b]/look[/b]/engage[/b] (052[/b]); help[/b]/take[/b] (055[/b]); overpower[/b] (061[/b]).

093.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] into the areas between the maze
093.text: With oversized wires and bulbs everywhere, it’s as if you’re inside the world’s biggest microchip. You tear off some circuitry as you venture forward; gain item 1190[/b]. Finally you emerge deeper in the planet; go to cave 043[/b].

094.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] across wires and floating steps to enter the mysterious city
094.text: Your tai chi lessons serve you well as you gracefully walk along the wires. Gain ability 1501[/b] and go to city 041[/b].

095.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] through the nest, avoiding contact with the eggs
095.text: You gingerly tiptoe between the pulsating sacs and manage not to disturb them. Proceed deeper into the planet to dungeon 596[/b]; keep this location for reference.

957.action: [b][MOVE] STEER[/b] (use only if you are at the top of a tower; if not, choose a different action)
957.text: Pair your current region (see look[/b] storybook) with its sky location (page 48 in the Book of Vantages), then go to that location.

096.action: [b][MOVE] APPROACH[/b] the dragon with an offer

choices.option: Pay $10 to earn the loyalty of the greedy dragon
choices.outcome: The dragon can’t resist its greatest weakness; gain animal 807[/b].

choices.option: Don’t pay, but assure the dragon you won’t hurt them
choices.outcome: The dragon lets out a mighty laugh. To your surprise, it gestures for you to pass. Advance deeper into the planet to cave 045[/b].

097.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] a button on a device
097.text: Your skin briefly glows the color of the runecaster, and you feel intensely sick afterward. Gain any 2 skills and lose 1 health. You stumble out of the chamber, advancing deeper into the planet to dungeon 598[/b]; keep this location for reference.

098.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] through the labyrinth of roots and doors
098.text: You delight in the puzzle of moving from one hollow trunk to the next, and eventually you emerge in the rear of the cavern, where a glowing door awaits. Go deeper into the planet to cave 044[/b] and gain 1 morale.

099.text: You become the third wheel to a pair of sentients listening to a tour guide describe the meaning of the cave paintings, which indicate that the origins of life on this planet were the result of highly advanced aliens visiting from the future. The guide then leads the three of you to a narrow entrance leading deeper into the planet. Go deeper into the planet to dungeon 599[/b] and do not lose health upon arrival; keep this location for reference.
